review_title: customer beware.......  just buy chips instead..
review_text:
This is the second time to purchase rio Rancho bowls... we liked the flavor so well...however on both occassions bowls were broken... the first time 3out of six... this last time five out of six... so broken we just had chips!...
While many would say..is it the manufacturers problem.... the question is..how do other companies package shells without breaking...
No company website and no response from a written letter sooo I would say I am done with rio rancho... they are now called rio raunchy in the way they handle client complaints..
parker ..stillwater ok

review_title: Good coffee, but I like the Breakfast Blend better
review_text: I like this coffee, but I prefer the Community Breakfast Blend over this one. This one is strong coffee and much better than Seattle's Best coffee that I bought when I ran out of the Community coffee. I really like this brand and this coffee. I will keep buying this brand.

It took a very long time for the product to arrive. I am not certain if I had not contacted the seller regarding my missing package, if I ever would have received it. I will not order from this seller again.

I ordered these on the advice of a friend. Per my friend, her dogs love them. She fills them with peanut butter and then freezes overnight. It takes her dogs several hours to get out the peanut butter. That cannot be said of Bichons. They can work it out in less than an hour. I find that it works better for me to stuff with dog biscuits. It takes longer for them to empty their Kongs.

Pros:
1) Size chart accurate - I ordered small for one of my boys. He weighs 12 lbs. It works fine. His small mouth can handle the medium as well. The medium works well for my 16 lb Bichon. The small is not too small. I do not worry about choking.
2) Kongs hold up well to hours of chewing

Cons: None

These are the best macadamias I've had! The right hardness with a crunchy start and soon after a feeling of them melting away in your mouth :) Great flavor, with no bitterness, excessive oil-ness, etc. And as if that wasn't enough, they're unsalted! That means you're not only getting more healthful nuts, but also getting to taste the real nut (rather than a whole bunch of salt). And the price seems good too (although I haven't really comparison-shopped).

We have enjoyed Millstone Coffee for years and until receiving our Keurig for Christmas, only drank Millstone Hazelnut Creme. (See my review for that coffee).
But now, we have discovered another joy by Millstone. Breakfast Blend is a light roast coffee which is what we enjoy drinking. It is a great cup of coffee to wake up with. It is not bitter and does not leave a bad taste.
Like Hazelnut Creme, I only wish it was easier to purchase. I wish Amazon would routinely carry this coffee with Prime.

My dog goes ga-ga over these treats. They smell wonderful and garlic-y. Since they are softer than real human beef jerky they can be easily chopped up into small bits that are perfect for training rewards. Not greasy, no fillers, lots of beef.....just perfect!!
I am a fan of chocolate like you have never known before and let me say this...I would write more but need my hands free to eat this incredible chocolate bar. OMG

These rice bars are so tasty. They aren't too sweet and it makes me feel good that my child is enjoying a healthy snack. Sadly, I enjoy them as much, maybe more, than my son does. They're great to nibble for a midday snack or if you want to throw them in your bag for a snack on the go. The bars are like a peanut butter flavored rice krispies treat, but with way better ingredients. They sell smaller boxes in the supermarket so you can always try them out before getting this bigger box. The value in the pack of 6 is there if you really enjoy the bars.
Don't judge me. I'm a kid at heart.
It's really crispy and the amount of chocolate filling is generous! It's at least 3 times cheaper getting it in bulk of 25 packs, as compared to buying it from the local supermarts.
My 3-year-old son loves this juice! It took a while to receive the product , but it was worth the wait.

review_title: Another flavor from Temptations my cats love
review_text: I think my cats are addicted to these treats. If they are sleeping and they hear me holding the bag, they came running, if they are playing, they stop playing and come running. It doesnt matter what they are doing, these treats are their priority in life. I cannot run out from these treats, they dont even allow me to sleep if I dont give them some treats before going to bed. And these natural ones seem delicious!!

I got this Lucky Bamboo this morning right before work, ( I work from home and sit at my desk all day long). I LOVED this! It was the perfect gift! I love orchids, they are my favorite. Although these orchids are artificial, they are still perfect for the live bamboo stalk. My Dad, the sender, thought they were real... but none the less, I just adore this beautiful and perfect size arrangement on my desk. :)

review_title: The only word for this is awful
review_text: I bought four packs of the Veranda blend without tasting first, and I'm going to throw three of them away. Imagine dishwater. Imagine dishwater in your coffee cup, ruining the most blissful part of your morning, and you have the Veranda blend. Maybe it's for people who don't like coffee? It doesn't taste anything like coffee (especially not the coffees served in a fine restaurant to which it was compared by another reviewer).
These should not be labeled "pretzels". More like compressed sawdust. Inedible in my opinion. And I'm stuck with 12 bags of them. Yuk!
Timothy's Decaf Colombian is a nice full-bodied, medium roast coffee. It is one of my favorite coffees as it is mellow, flavorful and not bitter (or too strong).
Can't rave about this enough. If you like sardines, this is the way to go. Just plain delicious.

review_title: Good-tasting, non-pill means of getting some vitamin B
review_text:
I was attracted to the idea of something that would help me get some B vitamins without gagging on gigantic pills. Some Vitamin C is a bonus, but Vitamin C is pretty easy to find in non-pill formats.

The caramel taste isn't as good as something like Werther's Original Hard Candies, 34-oz., but it does taste good. And I like the honey-filling too.

I like having a good-tasting, non-pill means of getting some vitamin B, though this is something I would have to hide from the kids so they don't just eat up the entire package.

I am giving this product a 1-star review not becuase it tastes bad, but because it is not what it claims to be. Harissa is a north-African condiment comprised primarily of chile peppers. This product claims it can be used as a dip and is comprised primary of red bell peppers. (Of the seven ingredients listed, chile peppers are next to last. No traditional Moroccan spices, such as cumin, are present in this product)

To put it in American terms, this is equivalent to purchasing a product called "Traditional American ketchup", only to discover that it is made out of red peppers instead of tomatoes.

Again, I am not saying that this is a bad-tasting product - you might enjoy it. My complaint is the claim that it's a "Traditional Moroccan" condiment. As other reviewers suggest, a product like Mustafa's harissa is closer to the real deal.

So an above review made me think I could microwave these. DON'T!

It's much better boiled properly. But I agree with the more time statement others are giving.
Personally I just added, probably 1/4 of a cup of sugar (for all of it) to the water and they turned out alright. Not like the ones you get normally, but pretty good.

Try with a smaller amount first though to get the sugar ratio you like.

Overall, a really good product and at a good price. I wish shipping wasn't so much, but since I have found it in a store yet, this will do.

I have a 4-year-old son and I try to at least partly manage his nutrition. Sometimes he'll eat almost anything we put in front of him and sometimes he'll eat almost nothing. It's these latter episodes that bother me, so I try to have some snack foods around just to be sure that he gets enough. Take chocolate milk, for example. I can almost always get a glass in him and it's good nutrition. Another item is whole-grain fruit bars. I shop at Fresh and Easy Neighborhood Markets and usually buy their store brand. They're whole grain and organic and taste rather good. If I give one to the boy it will almost always disappear in short order. Well, the last time I was there they had a small display of Kellogg's Nutri-grain Cereal Bars on half-price sale. I should have known better than to pick up a box of eight of the strawberry variety. I had one and it tasted fine, although I don't think it was as good as the store brand. My son wouldn't eat it. He just took one bite and that was it. I tried again the next day and got the same result. I don't understand it, but there's something about these bars that he just doesn't like. Well, maybe the guy has good judgement. I doubt that most people would notice, but he does.

Gary Peterson

review_title: Delicious! Similar texture to oat granola!
review_text: I purchased this product in the last week from a local store and was so suprised at 1.) How good it tastes and 2.) How much the texture is like real oat granola. I had seen the GF granola before but did not get it because I thought the flakes would make it more like flake cereal. I was definitely mistaken. Not only does it satisfy my texture cravings, it has some great ingredients like flax seeds and dried fruit. It actually had a good ratio of fruit to nuts and other contents, rather than having one or 2 pieces of fruit in the whole bag like some other manufacturers like to do. In all, I totally loved this product and now that I see buying in bulk from Amazon will save me $2/bag, I will be sure to buy it here next time!

I first tried this at my mom and dad's house (in the Vanilla flavor) and was hooked. Then, after checking out the stats, I was even more hooked and ordered the Caramel right away. I do a low sugar or sugar free diet and this fits perfectly into my diet as a treat. With only 80 calories, 4.5 grams of fat and 5 sugars, it's a win/win situation for me. I do brew it with 10 oz of water instead of 8, otherwise it's just a little too sweet for me. All in all, I'm very happy with this product and will order more when I run out.

On that warm July day when I first opened the recently arrived cardboard box of mystery, I was deeply saddened and upset when the dinobone I purchased was in fact a Stegasaurus and not the advertised T-Rex.

What would my dog think? Surely ALL HUMANS AND ANIMALS are well aware that the Stegasaurus comes nowhere near the badassness of a T-Rex. Would my dog like it? Would it chew on its nylony stega-carcus?

Yes.
I have finally found a low acidic coffee. My stomach loves you. I cannot give up my coffee in the a.m. Thank you.
An Asian co-worker gave me one of these. This candy is awesome. And, apparently, somewhat good for you! I bought 10 bags, and I pass them out to students. Most awesome candy ever...

review_title: My Favorite Indian Food, Ready to Eat
review_text:
I live in NYC and have access to many wonderful Indian restaurants. I love Indian food and I also make it at home (no prepared packages). This particular ready made dish is simply wonderful.

I believe it is very close to going to an Indian restaurant. I love spicy food and if it is not spicy enough I alter it. This dish is somewhat there, not as I would normally want. My reason for liking it so much is simple, the spices and flavors are wonderful, I cannot get enough of it. When I cannot cook I come home after a long day of work, add rice and a vegetable to this packaged prepared food. I do not feel a need for meat. I am not a vegetaria, I cook with fish and no fat chicken or turkey sometimes. For me, none of this is necessary. The spices/flavor are more then good. I do not eat breakfast or lunch so having said this, most likely this packaged food with simple additions, would be fine for two people. Try it, you may like it as much as I do. I think it is more then like, just great!

I am a connoisseur of coffe. I have been drinking coffee since birth - drank it all through my teen years, college years, and through all my years as a police officer (yes, I like donuts, especially with coffee).

Anyway, make no mistake...I know coffee. Assuming you are using a quality coffee maker - fresh quality coffee - fresh cold water - then you must know that a quality coffee filter is of the utmost importance.

People tend to overlook this little item but let me tell you - the coffee filter is as vital to the taste of the coffee as the quality of coffee you use. You might think - yeah right! Well, I sugggest you try a quality filter like Melitta and taste for yourself - if not, then you might as well use a rag as your coffee filter.

Enjoy your coffee the way it should be enjoyed - Good day!

I've tried many different types of raw honey, and this dandelion honey is incredible. It has a bright yellow appearance and smells and tastes like dandelions, yet it's very sweet and delectable. It really makes me feel great. Highly recommended.
These are yummy, healthy little treats for my kids but I won't be buying them again due to the price. I can find them at Target for cheaper and without shipping and handling.

Eight O'Clock is by far the best whole bean coffee available. This Dark Italian Roast is great for people who like strong flavour without the bitter bite. It is smooth and strong with a deep rich flavour but with no bitter taste. I only wish a store local to me had it.

I had heard, and read, favorable reviews about this product so I decided to try it. It is not available here in Michigan, only in the south. It is primo, and arrived in time for the wrap up of the BLT season. Best mayo I have tasted.

This does not taste like Kraft, but it has its own unique and tasty flavor. It is easy to make just like the mac and cheese we made as kids. All the Road's end cheese products I have tried pack so much taste into products that are so low in fat as well as being dairy free (and gluten free in the case of this product). Their gluten-free, dairy free cheddar cheese mix is great as well.

Yum! A friend introduced me to these. It was love at first bite. They are VERY sweet so they are best consumed in moderation. I put them out for Christmas and they were gone in no time. It is a good thing there were two boxes. One to share. One to NOT share.
love these but, could only find them at gelsons in pasadena. they are delicious and a bargain at this price.

review_title: Limited Ingrediant Diet wroks as described.
review_text:
After doing a lot of research on foods for dogs with allergies, I happened upon this brand, and flavor in particular for its positive reaction for so many other dogs with allergies. I have to say it has worked wonders for my dog. Her regular itching, diarrhea, etc. occurrences that the vet could never figure out, and were just treated with various antibiotics, were essentially cured with this food. I also use the same formula for her treats as well. That's it, no other ingredient types. I'm very satisfied so far. My only complaint is no local stores stock the smaller bite sin the larger bags.

Just a note: I recommend this size even for 30-40 lb dogs. The larger pieces are VERY hard and were a bit difficult for my dog to chew.

The only con to this formula is that your dog WILL be going #2 more often. It is sweet potato after all. Mine went from typically twice, but no more, to guaranteed three times a day. However her allergies are under control and she is happy eating the food so that is all that matters to me.

Don't understand why that people are happy with the price here. Please check other stores or online shops, you can just easily find much cheaper price than this. Even more than 10 dollars difference as compare to Sam's Club.
Compared to other Fussie premium cat foods we tried this seems to have less in the can. We had them in 3 different occasions and cans do not have as much food so our cats feel hungry very soon.

review_title: Best Earl Grey on the market
review_text: Excellent full-bodied bergamot flavor without the after taste. Bigelow's Earl Grey tea is the consistent overwhelming favorite brand in my office. Definitely recommend.
Delicious, healthy beans with BPA free lining. They are great on salads, in hummus, or just alone. I highly recommend them! Wish more companies were as responsible as Eden Organic.

This Campbell's Chunky Grilled Chicken & Sausage Gumbo is one surprising meal to find just from opening a can (easy opener, too). Spicy (but not too much to annoy my sensitive stomach), interesting, but not too filling. Good idea to have something else along with this; at least some bread or hot bun. The whole can yields hardly 15 grams of protein which is about 1/3 of your minimum needs. The sodium (table salt) amount is about 70% of your daily needs. A lot from just one meal (too much for some people with high blood pressure).

But if you are a calorie watcher it is good news: the entire can is only 300 calories. And, as mentioned, it tastes fantastic. I may buy a couple more cases of this. It makes a quick, enjoyable lunch experience. Take it to work in a thermos flask. Canned soups and stews have improved over the years and this is an excellent example.

If you NEED lots of calories and protein in a canned stew, try some of the beef stews Campbells sells; they're not as tasty, though!

I love bai, because it's light, refreshing, all natural, organic and delicious. I love the idea that I can get so many anti-oxidants in such a small vessel. I only wish it were available in more of the larger supermarkets. What's the holdup?

The great thing about these mixes is that they can be used as a lot of things; frostings, spreads, fillings, cheesecakes, etc. So I really think that I am getting my money's worth by purchasing this product. Not to mention that they all taste really good! My personal favorite is the Caramel Nutter Butter. I love the nutty factor to it and it is best served as a cheesecake! It makes the perfect dessert for family get-togethers and the like.

Unfortunately, I am not a fan of this product. As I like both fruit tastes, I thought I would enjoy this. Not. I gave a few to friends, but after a taste, they did not want them either. Sorry! Just a difference in tastes.

Ok , well first I did not get the variety I ordered , I got the Crunchy Cinnamon kind , and I was going to send them back. Until I saw they were all out of stock... things like these save me , when we need to be out and about , now that we cannot have wheat. So we tried them , the 8, year old says they taste like mini muffin tops, the 12 year old says , they are good coverd in milk like cereal , the 14 year old , who eats nothing ,ate them , and the two older ones did too , but in all fairness they eat everything.. we all like them , and Ian's is a great company to support , with wonderful kid food , for kids who can't have wheat .
Bragg Liquid Aminos is a much healthier alternative to soy sauce and it tastes the same! I love using it to season anything, from tofu to chicken. LOVE IT!

This is great stuff. I got it for my smoothies, but it also tastes good enough to put in just water or even milk. It is not as soluble as I would prefer, but that is natural for some of the many healthy ingredients.

I never thought anything could pull me away from my Jif, but this stuff actually tastes good. Okay, it's maybe not quite as good as the big J, but for 85% less fat and calories it is well worth the slight difference.

review_title: Light, crispy and delicious, but very delicate!
review_text: Well, my title says it all. Schar is my absolute favorite for all things gf, and these crackers are fantastic like everything else of theirs. They have a light and crispy texture and have a mild toasted flavor much like a saltine (but not salty). The only drawback is how brittle they are. I've bought them from Amazon and other gf warehouses and they arrive in many pieces every time - you will seldom get a whole cracker in a package. And if you can get a large enough piece, it likely won't stay in one piece while you are handling it, and forget about trying to spread anything on it. Doesn't stop me from buying them though as they are a lot like the gluten-filled varieties of crackers in terms of taste and texture. I will make little hard-cheese "sandwiches" out of the pieces, and they are excellent to eat if you don't feel well. Probably not a good item to use for entertaining though.

I live in a small town and could no longer find Angel hair pasta nests,but as usual Amazon came to the rescue. It arrived very quickly and now I have enough of this pasta to last for a while.It's delicious and cooks very quickly.

I used to buy Inspired Cuisine Mousse Mix, Milk Chocolate, 2.8-Ounce Boxes (Pack of 8) at the grocery store but it was too expensive. I decided to give this brand a try since it is cheaper, to me it tastes the same! Love this mousse, will try the dark chocolate next!

Over the years, this chili powder has gotten harder to find. It has been a staple of our family's chili for decades, and I am very glad to be able to still purchase it. It has a perfect blend of seasonings that requires nothing more than ground beef, onions, and tomato soup to make an outstanding bowl of chili. Williams Chili Seasoning Bulk Mix 18 oz

These bars are so healthy you would think they would taste plain. They are fantastic. Wonderful chocolate and high in protein with the peanut butter. I originally purchased them for a snack....they can be a meal replacement anytime.....you never feel hungry.

I make smoothies, Lots of smoothies. Both this, and PB2 straight-up ... are my favorite additions. Chocolate shakes with chocolate PB2 are like eating a very chocolaty peanut butter cup ...through a straw ... with the fat removed ... Sinful without the guilt!!! Add a few extra ice cubes and it turns thick as soft ice cream. OMG! If you're on a diet (or not), this my friend, is your new guilty pleasure. I know it's mine! Try it. You will be hooked.

These teething biscuits are great, if you HOVER OVER YOUR CHILD THE WHOLE 4 DAYS it takes to eat this mess factory. Holy Crap, my daughter almost needed a Steel Wool pad to get the dried gunk off her body. She had it everywhere, on her nose, in her nose, her eyebrow, her elbow, armpit and legs...plus the high chair needed a pressure washer! I seriously think concrete is mixed in with this recipe. The first time we gave one of these teething jaw-breakers to our daughter we realized we would be up until midnight by the time she finished slurping the brick down. Fortunately, my husband who will eat anything ate it and said it was actually tasty. Kind of like those first generation Power Bars, you know, the ones that tasted like eating your front yard. Needless to say, our daughter did not CHOKE THE FIRST TIME, BUT SHE DID THE NEXT and we have decided that she will not have these anymore, unless they have soaked in a vat of water for three days. These things are so dense they are probably like sea monkeys...they probably expand to the size of our house, so we will soak them in an igloo cooler in the backyard.

Still, prior to our daughter choking on these teething bricks we did discover their magical powers. The next morning after her first gnaw session, our daughter was walking, talking and was even potty trained. My husband called me into her room the next morning and to my surprise, there my little 9 month old girl stood there holding her soiled diaper (yes, she undressed herself as well) yelling at my husband how she was sick and tired of having to pee on herself all of the time. We knew right then, the teether had something to do with this. We have been cautious thus far with giving her more since we do not fully understand the powers this biscuit holds! Thinking it would effect adults the same way, my husband bought a case and ate them over the next three days. He did not get smarter, but he has been constipated for the past 3 months and he cannot stop drooling. The second time we provided our daughter with one of these we found her the next morning downstairs watching Good Will Hunting yelling at the screen disproving all mathematical theories presented to the screen. Yep, our daughter then decided to build a nuclear fission reactor in my husbands shower! All I can say is be cautious of the biscuits power...your little Junior might be telling you how to change your oil the next morning or how to cook his eggs!
- Show quoted text -

When I received the product it did not match what was on the invoice without any explanations. I contacted the merchant and letting them know of my dissatisfaction. I received a prompt reply and explanation and offer of credit for price of purchase on furture orders. I have not had the opportunity to puchase anything but the responses I did get were personal and not as if they came out of a template.

I will difinitely use them again!!

The candy was still delicious!!

These are the same Honey Made graham crackers I grew up eating so if you liked those or you like them today, what is there not to like here?

In 2+oz packs they are easy to use if you want to control portion size and also to transport though they will still break apart just as if you put then in your own baggie. That's the only potential negative here because they do cost more than if you portioned out your own crackers. But if you are busy or just don't want the hassle, this is a good way to help yourself and your loved ones take just a bit of sweetness with you.

My kids enjoy this goat milk product with their cereal and I use it for cooking as well. Although I haven't tried many goat milk products this one is easy since I make what I need. Therefore there is little waste. It is also easy to pack and take when traveling. Overall, I recommend this product.

There isn't much to say. You can either spend days making your own or buy this! Amazons price is less than half of what I was paying for this, it used to be a splurge and now will be a regular at our table. Used as a base, you can make many different sauces with ease, you'll be the hit at the table.

I had a very hard time working with these wrappers as they were slimey and so thin that when I tried to roll them they would rip. When I put them in the hot oil, they burst open and all the ingredients came out of them and floated around in the oil. I threw the remaining wrappers in the garbage.

review_title: Never liked oatmeal until I tried this
review_text: WOW! I grew up hating oatmeal - thought it was slimey and reminded me of wallpaper paste. Could only tolerate it when used as an ingredient in cookies, meatloaf, etc. First time I ate Silver Palate Oatmeal I was amazed at the difference. There was actual taste and texture that was good! I've since tried other rough cut, minimally processed oatmeals but I keep coming back to Silver Palate. Sometimes I even get a craving for this oatmeal - which I would never have imagined could happen to a confirmed oatmeal hater.

This is a tasty low cal snack and the single serve bags are good for those who won't rest until the bag is empty. If you need to watch your sodium this is not a low sodium food. The Jalapeno is spicy without burning your tongue and lips.

We use this as a back-up for raw feeding, and our pup absolutely loves it. Although THK isn't technically raw, it doesn't cause much digestive upset when we use it between regular raw meals. The one gripe I have about this food is the poo factor; this stuff produces a HUGE amount of stool in comparison with real raw. When our Darwin's shipment was delayed last month, I had to use THK exclusively for a week. I was shocked when I cleaned up the yard that Saturday--the amount of poo had nearly tripled! Hence, we use this food only occasionally.

From reading reviews of all the stash green teas, I decided to get the organic pinhead version for better quality. I think it is excellent though it is not cheap. The leaves look in excellent shape and only a spoonful is needed in a teapot. I made the mistake of using too much tea for my first pot but this is a tasty tea.

When you are on a strict diet like the hcg diet, you look for variety, and these are the perfect match! Alessi Rosemary Breadsticks give you just a little bit of flavor that makes it possible to endure the monontony of the diet. After the diet, these are a great accompaniment to any soup or salad meal. I am going to purchase more when I am done with the stabilization portion of the diet, just to have around for snacks, soup and salad meals.

review_title: One of the Best Soda Drinks in the World
review_text: My sister introduced me to Virgil's Black Cherry Cream Soda earlier this year. I've tried many sodas in my lifetime, and I have to honestly say that Virgil's Black Cherry Cream Soda is one of the best tasting drinks I've ever had. I can't really describe it, but I feel happy when I drink this. I love any cherry-flavored or orange-flavored drinks. Anyways, it's very pleasing to the tastebuds. And it goes down smoothly. I also love Virgil's Orange Cream Soda, Root Beer, and Real Cola. Usually, I would normally drink Glaceau Vitaminwater, particularly Focus (Thank you, Kelly Clarkson to introducing us to Focus flavor - she was the first spokesperson for Focus Glaceau Vitaminwater), or different brands of water. I usually drink healthy drinks. But if I want to reward myself with something indulgent - Virgil's different flavored cream sodas are my indulgent drink treat. Try it, you'll like it. I thank my sister for introducing me to this amazing soda.

These are 6.7 oz. cans, 190 grams, with a 3.5 recommended serving that contains 250 mg of sodium per serving. This herring tastes great, in my opinion. If you're concerned about ingredients, visit [...], where they always list the nutritional content of all the products they sell.

I hate to cook, and I'm always looking for easy foods that are nutritious, taste good, and take little time to prepare. This canned herring fits the bill, offering 7 grams of protein per serving and 1 gram of sugar. The tomato sauce gives it the added flavor; I've tried the same brand with peppercorns and it isn't as flavorful, but it is passable.

I've had this herring in tomato sauce with roast squash and broccoli, as a sandwich, and added to garden salad. With a drink of choice, it becomes part of a good meal.
This coffee has great flavor in both decaf and regular. If I had to chose one coffee to drink this would be it.

review_title: Always good and perfect for caramel apples
review_text:
For the last several years my grandsons and I have been making caramel apples--I do the organizing; they do the "creating." Our caramels of choice are Kraft Caramel because they get to do the task of unwrapping the small morsels to start the process and I do the microwaving. They then take over the time-honored tradition of creating the Famous P______ Caramel Apples. It's truly amazing how caramel, M&Ms, and chocolate sprinkles can transform a simple apple into such a splendid 1-lb. marvel of sweet delight. It is so much fun and it is a great kick-off to fall...and one of the precious times I get to be alone with the boys to hear about school and "stuff" before the Holidays invade. And all of this fun almost didn't happen this year!! It seems that Northern California is not among the recipients of Kraft Caramels any longer, so I was delighted that Amazon.com was able to save the day--and our tradition. Thanks, Amazon.

One warning, this lot of 12 bags of caramels do NOT come with the sticks needed to make caramel apples. If you plan to use the caramels for apples, be sure to stock up on a bag of sticks from your local crafts store. I wish you all a great time as you create your own "Famous Caramel Apples!"

If you are trying to get a great tasting gum + a fresh scented breath, this is the gum for you.
It is the most favorite gum for Puerto Ricans on the Island and now it is available anywhere through Amazon. If you are like me, demanding in quality and taste this is for you. I stacked up for a year, maybe you will also. Be the first one among your friends to have the most unique tasting gum and the very fresh and clean scented breath. .... Enjoy!
doesn't really taste like chocolate. I bought it in hopes of curbing my after dinner sweet tooth and need for chocolate. It really just tastes like regular tea, I do not taste chocolate.
Best dark chocolate covered orange peel I have ever tasted. I just keep ordering more once I run out. I can't find it this good anywhere else.

When you pay for 50 K-Cups you expect to receive 50 not 42. The K-cups are expensive enough already.

I think a new K-Cup counter needs to be hired at Amazon.
Twinings Darjeeling tea is our favorite tea and buying the bags in large quantities is both convenient and cost efficient.

review_title: Wow!  The best smelling and tasting coconut oil yet!
review_text:
I'm very strict with my diet. I eat only organic foods, practice CRON (calorie restriction with optimal nutrition), eat minimal carbs and lots of nutrients. I've tested 4 other brands of organic coconut oil -- Nutiva, Spectrum Naturals, and 2 small scale raw food companies. This one is easily the best so far.

The aroma is wonderful and the texture is much fuller than the other brands. This coconut oil has fuller taste and less watered-down feeling than the other brands. So if you're looking for a good organic coconut oil, this is the one.

Now for some quick facts about how amazingly healthy this stuff is:

1) Medium chain fatty acids --> Digest very easily without requiring the gall bladder to do much. Great for people missing gallbladders and truly everyone.

2) Converts to usable energy very quickly. A much more balanced and less manic energy than any carbohydrate (fructose, lactose, glucose, etc)

3) Anti-viral, anti-parasitic, anti-bacterial, anti-fungal. Keeps your digestive system very clean inside. Helps destroy candida and balance intestinal (probiotic) bacteria. Helps the immune system.

4) Longer lasting energy without insulin levels being adversely affected. Fats are the cleanest burning energy for our body. Carbohydrates cause insulin levels to raise and crash, which is what creates the "eat every 3 hours" cravings that so many people this is hunger. Healthy fats, like this oil, will not affect insulin and give us much more stable energy that last longer in the body.

5) Tastes great. Smells great.

6) Can be used topically to make the skin very soft. Is absorbed into the skin to nourish it, unlike most cosmetic moisturizers which leave residue or cause long-term dryness by unbalancing the body's innate skin oil balance.

7) Can be used as a sexual lubricant. Coconut oil is a natural anti-viral, anti-fungal, and anti-bacterial lubricant which helps keep these organs clean and reduce the spread of unwanted problem.

8) Great for hair and can be used as a leave-on conditioner. Like it's skin use, coconut oil will not imbalance the body's natural oils.... unlike chemical-based conditioners. Plus, because coconut is anti-"everything bad" it will keep the hair clean too!

9) Coconut oil detox cleanse. The medium-chain fatty acids make this and ideal food for detox cleanses because the energy is available with minimal digestive effort, plus all of it's anti-"everything bad" properties. The detox cleanse is a 3 to 7 day process where all carbohydrate foods are removed and coconut oil is eaten as the primary energy source (approx. 14 Tablespoons each day). The oil can be combined with organic lemon water as well. You can find the instructions by Googling "Natural News Coconut Oil Cleanse".

Basically, coconut oil is amazing! And this brand is the best I've found so far. Enjoy!

*** Update: I found a good website for coconut oil information and recipes. It has summaries of many studies on coconut oil. Visit coconutdiet (dotcom)

I'm always careful about products for my color treated "naturally blonde" hair. This conditioner is thick, goes on smoothly, has a fresh and very pleasant scent and does a very nice job. My hair is silky and smooth after use, and I've noticed it doesn't get so flyaway in humid weather. This goes great with the matching shampoo, of course. Highly recommend.

review_title: Vegetable Beef soup-didn't like the flavor
review_text: I am a huge fan of Beer Creek's Chicken Noodle Soup. The soup is delicious and I buy it by the case. I decided to try the Vegetable Beef. Bought a case and ended up not liking it at all. It just seems to have a horrible taste -no vegetable or beef flavor at all. So if you happen to try this one FIRST, don't use it as an example......it's just a matter of personal taste because the Chicken Noodle is a 10-star soup!!
I was introduced to this brand by a German couple living in Japan. I buy it whenever I see it in a German deli or international shop.
Flavor was good but didn't care for the texture. One grain was thoroughly cooked while another was too crunchy.

I have 2 German Shepherds and both have very sensitive stomachs. We used to deal with diarrhea frequently. Once we switched to Royal Canin everything got better. Also, the pieces are pretty big so unlike other food the dogs can't just swallow these without properly chewing first. I highly recommend this food to all the German Shepherd owners.

This is a waste of money & the machine is a waste of money. I got all this as a gift. If the makers weren't ripoff artists they would have made it easy to put your own coffee in...like Keurig did. This product is just a lot of marketing hype. Not even remotely worth the money.
I also bought this for my 89 yr old dad for father's day. He loved it. He is very hard to shop for too. I am pleased with this purchase!
I haven't drank or used any other sweetner except splenda in 5 yrs. There is no after taste and it just has an extremely pleasant taste.
Another awesome blend by Weaver's. Makes a perfectly rich and deep and flavorful Espresso, without the burnt bitterness of so many others. Can't wait for Amazon to have it.

review_title: So Coconut all you need are the trees ...
review_text:
Normally I am not a fan of coconut. And when it comes in jelly beans, I am even less of a fan. But I love these.

They start out with a real coconut taste ... you can almost see the palm trees swaying and hear the ukuleles in the background at the luau. As they dissolve, they become almost a fruity coconut, even more pleasurable to my taste buds. If you love coconut, you can't go wrong with these, but I do recommend that you try the sampler first, David's Signature Beyond Gourmet Jelly Beans Flavor Sampler, just because there are so many different flavors to try.

I am grateful to have received a complimentary sampler to try these, and am loving almost all of the flavors. I didn't expect to enjoy this particular flavor, but I really did.

David was the original inventor of the Jelly Belly, and has returned to the competition with a wonderful set of new flavors on his own! While these are more pricy, they are most assuredly worth it, if you are interested in pure flavors.

Best of all for me, these do not contain artificial colors and flavorings, since I have a significant number of allergies.

Best tasting granola bar I have ever had (and I've tried many....I'm kind of a health nut). They are a little expensive and hard to find but buying by the bundle may be a good idea. What I love about Kashi products is that they are all natural, tasty, and good for you (whole grains). I eat a bar whenever I want a little snack and one about 1/2 hour before my workout. It seems to provide the perfect amount of carbs to fuel my workout, plus satifies my sweet tooth without my feeling guilty (yummy chocolate chips). I'm currently in Iraq and I have my mom and sister send me about 4-5 boxes at time. I'm obsessed!!!

I am a very fussy coffee drinker and this is, without any doubt at all, the best of the decafs available. You feel like you've had a 'real' cup of coffee.......not too weak, not too strong, but with a rich look and taste. No one, on a dare, could ever tell that this isn't regular coffee or 'high-test' as I like to call it. For the record, I've tried many different brands and Tully in general is always very good.

With it's well balanced spices and deliciously tangy aftertaste this is what I like to put on a bacon sandwich.
Save the ketchup for chicken and fries.
It also lend's itself well to being an extra spicy kick to soups, casseroles and bolognese, just add whilst cooking.
I always have a bottle in my house, why don't you.

I don't think I'd buy these particular treats again, but I do like the Zuke's treats for my puppy. These were a weird texture, and I had to tear them apart and they are of a paper-like consistency. I'm just going to stick to buying other treats from Zuke's I know my dog enjoys.

review_title: Kraft Mac 'n Cheese - no artificial colors
review_text: We tried this because it does not have artificial colors. It tastes similar but better than the standard kraft mac and cheese. Our entire family loves it. We haven't tried the toppings.

My dog absolutely loves Charlee Bears. Give her a couple at the same time as dinner, and dinner waits, she goes straight for the Charlee Bears. Unfortunately, the pet store I used to get them from stopped selling them. I'm so glad I found them on Amazon! I can't wait to order some, my dog will be so happy! Plus, they're the only treats I've seen that will fit into her TreatBall.
I have a craving for potato chips of all types. These were more than reasonably priced and are flavorful without being overly salty. Highly recommend them as a compliment for a lunch room.

review_title: Better Than Nabisco's Idea of a cookie
review_text: Nabisco & Keebler both make 100 calorie cookie products, but where Nabisco's is tasteless Mini Chips, Keebler's are real cookies only smaller. They look (and taste) like REAL cookies. Why Nabisco can't take note, and follow suit, is beyond my comprehension. Thus, where Keebler's taste great, Nabisco's taste like sweet sawdust.
If you like the stronger taste of ginger then this product would be for you. As for me, I will go back to my old standby ginger candy.
I've tried many a types and flavors and this is my favorite. French Vanilla is also good.
These must be good for you because they taste horrible. I eat them with Tamari Almonds and it improves the experience.

Tobin James is an excellent wine, and this one especially! My husband and I have enjoyed a few Tobin James merlots. It's difficult to find such good wine at such a reasonable price. If you ever have a chance to go to the Tobin James tasting room in Paso Robles, I highly recommend it! Cheers!
This is a great product at a great price. Stays fresh and the flavor is good. My Sams used to carry (another) brand, but stopped selling it. This is a better tasting product and much, much cheaper.
Tried Licorette once and have been hooked ever since. Also anyone who tries it also asks me to buy them some. Nice tasting candy, I recommend this product to all.

review_title: Too sweet for me to snack on
review_text: I don't drink milk but I do snack on cereals directly from the box. This product might be just fine with milk--I can't tell. But, as a snack it was too overpoweringly sweet for me. I like strawberry as much as the next person. Of course, there's tons of wheat (they ARE min-wheats) so lots of gluten. As a commercial (vs. health-type) food, it's got sugar as it's second largest ingredient. It also has bunches of questionable ingredients--artificial this and that, but some added vitamins too. You might very well love this; I didn't.

I tried this coffee two years ago and found it much better then other brands of coffee I had had before. Since then I have been buying Gevalia coffee at Amazon. Amazon offers a good price, even lower than that on the Gevalia online store.

I had found this in a store locally years ago and remembered how wonderfully unique it was. Unfortunately they all stopped carrying it.

Found some in a store a bit farther away recently and had to get a block.

The appearance and texture are remarkably like peanut butter, especially after it warms up a bit. But the flavor is like nothing else I've ever had. It seems like several "almost" familiar flavors that come through, but it is still completely unique somehow.

Thank you Norway for a delicious variation on cheese.
Seems to work, and this is a good Subscribe price. Will continue to use and recommend. Mixes well in smoothie.
This tea is the perfect amount of spice, sweet and warmth to it. They have clear directions for steeping and so reasonable. Its the only tea I buy now.

Recenly purchased a 6 pack of these cookies because my 3 year old loves oreo's and had recently bought Country Choice at a local health food store and loved those. Found Newman-O's to be a few dollars cheaper and figured they would taste pretty much the same as the other organic brand. Next time I'll pay the extra money for Country Choice Organic chocolate sandwich cookies. I do like the fact that Newman's cookies are organic and have no trans-fat, but they lack a bit when it comes to taste. We'll finish our 6 pack but won't buy these again when there are other organic cookies out there.

review_title: What can I say, they're crackers.
review_text: But I did feel it necessary to review because I have ordered these multiple times and they never, ever arrive broken or like the box has been tossed down a flight of stairs. Something you certainly can't say about other grocery items ordered on Amazon.
I'm happy to have discovered this product, my dog is happy and so am I no more buying products that I'm wasting money on.
Not at all impressed with this product!! It arrived all melted together :( If you want candy corn that is NOT a big clump of yellow, orange, and white, get it from someone else! So disappointed!!

This tea is just way too sour for me. I'm still kinda new to the whole moving away from Celestial Seasonings thing, but I don't think I could ever grow to like this flavour. It makes me pucker up immediately and I want to cut it with even more water. Perhaps in time I can use this stuff up, but I shall not purchase this blend again.
These really are the best bully sticks I have gotten. They are clean, not too smelly and the dog goes nuts over them.
I was really excited when I ordered this due to the rave reviews but got very disappointed because all of the 3 boxes that I ordered are expired.

This is very good coffee when prepared by itself, but it doesn't play well with others. I tend to mix flavored coffees into my plain coffee to get a mild flavor and to smoothe out the edges on the (cheaper) plain coffee that I buy. This has a fairly mild flavor on its own, which is lovely by itself, but when mixed with other coffee it brings out an unpleasant note that was rejected by the whole office.

While this product does sweeten beverages as promised, it dissolves much slower than other similar products. Also, even though a dessicator packet was included in each container, most tablets still were stuck together. Some tablets were so stuck together that they broke upon an attempt to pry the tabs apart.

Coffee is absolutely delicious! And what a bargain these K-cups are compared to the prices in stores. The subscription series to it is great--you don't have to use gas to get to a store that sells K-cups (in my case, it's about a 20 mile round trip to the nearest store that sells K-cups)--the coffee just comes to you. The convenience of changing the subscription to match plans (such as vacations or whatever) is great. Highly recommended for anyone who has a Keurig machine.

I bought this at a local store near me thinking it would be a nice alternative to drinking soda or flavored beverages. Maybe its just the mint flavor or maybe its me but it tastes like you are drinking toothpaste. I didn't care for it at all. Just figured I'd let people know before they spent the money.
My Scottish Terrier, 'Aries' LOVES these treats. I highly recommend them for dogs with sensitive digestive systems. He can't seem to get enough.

I love Vanilla. I add it to (practically) everything, and this is, by far, the best vanilla extract on the market. Rich and decadent, this vanilla extract is the perfect addition for cookies, breads, yogurts, frostings, cakes, etc.

Imitation vanilla extract is not worth purchasing--buy the real stuff, and buy this stuff. The 32-ounce bottle is a better deal than buying it in smaller bottles, and it won't go bad quickly (as an alcohol). Simply store it in a cool, dry place, and refill your smaller bottle as needed.

Another favorite of mine is the Nielsen-Massey Vanilla Bean Paste--add it to frostings for an extra punch of vanilla seed specks! (It can also replace vanilla extract in any recipe.)

we brush our dogs teeth in the morning and feed once a day at evening time so we give him a Greenie after he eats to clean up his teeth and breath because we give him Sardine oil with his meal and this works great "no fish breath". He loves the Greenies.

review_title: ABC Kecap Manis Sweet Soy Sauce
review_text: Great suace for any Indonesian dish, Asian foods, over rice, etc... texture is more syrupy than soy sauce and sweeter.

Great bone! I thought the first one I bought was big but he second one was even bigger! Great long lasting bone. Perfect for the dog that needs to chew for hours! Definitely cannot eat in one sitting or even one week! Would highly recommend, I have a 50+ pound 6 month puppy and this is by far his favorite bone!

review_title: great way to lose weight, boost motabolism
review_text: If you're looking to buy this, you've probably had crystal light before. Awesome buying the packets in large amounts, as I drink them all the time. the "pure" crystal lights are also better for you as they don't have the artificial sweeteners they say can cause cancer or whatever. Drinking these instead of normal drinks is a great way to shed a few hundred calories from your diet a day. Also drinking lots of water boosts your metabolism, also a great way to maintain/lose weight. Make the purchase, you won't be dissapointed!

I love gummi bears and Haribo is the best by far. My family polished off this 5lb bag in only a week.
So it's true: Haribo macht Kinder froh - und Erwachsene ebenso! (Haribo makes children joyful and adults also!)
And such a good deal from Amazon!

So it came with beautiful greens and full of flowers. Was really optimistic, no instructions - i.e. how old is it? After the flowers died, it got fleas, which are soil related. It bugged my other plants. However, its a cutting of a shrub, not a bonsai. Its just stuck in a bonsai pot. Now I'm in the bug spraying mode- frustrating. It would have been easier to care for it as a plant, since its buggy. Now I have to train it into a bonsai. It seems root bound, but we're not supposed to anything the first year. Gardenias are hardy but delicate so I'm frustrated with spraying for bugs and for the season I have to bring it in and I hate bugs.

Other supermarket brands just don't compare. These Guittard chocolate chips will bring out the best in your favorite recipe, that is if you can help eating them straight out of the bag. I use these in my cherry chocolate chip cookies and they add just the right "grown up" touch; the taste is dark without being bitter with just the right amount of sweet. Another favorite is a sprinkle of them on top of corn bread mini muffins, a treat I always enjoyed at a Canadian Pancake House while waiting for Sunday breakfast. Sweet!

Great product for cooking! Adds loads of flavor and HEAT! Be careful when using as it doesn't take very much to get it the way you want it. The flavor intensifies if you let it set a while and continues through the cooking process.

review_title: excellent Shampoo for soft but manageable hair
review_text: This is a great shampoo. Not only does it clean my hair nicely, but it leaves just the right amount of a very pleasant scent. I am middle aged, and my hair is getting drier, and from the first use, this has left my hair softer. I don't have dandruff, but my scalp is dry and will itch after using some shampoos, not so with this one. One of the benefits I found it that it is a bit richer than some other brands, and being less watery, you can get results with a very small amount so that the bottle lasts much longer. Since I wash my hair every day, I only use conditioner every other time, and that routine is working well for me. This product reminds me of a salon quality shampoo at an affordable price.

We were thrilled to find that Dark Chocolate Peanut M&Ms were available and happily ordered the 56 oz size. Unfortunately, that's where our happiness ended.

The M&Ms that we received were not in the resealable 56 oz bag, but in three regular 19.2 oz bags. We received them with other light items, also ordered from Amazon. The box that the product arrived in was unharmed and undamaged, and so were the other items. However, the M&Ms had obviously been crushed and melted before being packed. It was obvious when we picked up one of the M&M bags that the candy inside was all stuck together.

Not only was the candy we received not as described in its quantity and packaging, it was not in any acceptable condition. This is the first bad experience I have had with Amazon. We will be ordering from Amazon again, but not from Bice Wholesale.

Yes the packaging was different than they show on the advertisement but, the flavor was outstanding. I've had several types of pista over the years and this one is fresh and good tasting. Very hard to get Indian Sweets here in the St.Louis area, and this company will get my repeat business! Lightning fast shipping and quality products. I was very pleasantly pleased. The taste was a bit "mild" (IE: Not strongly nut flavored) but yet very good as well, not at all to "mushy" or hard.
Warmly,
Jackie

I've been drinking Zevia for several years. Ginger-ale is my favorite, and the Ginger Root beer is pretty good. Most of the flavors, though, are just too sweet and too strongly flavored. I remedy this by filling a glassful of ice with half a glass of Perrier and topping it off with Zevia. I do not like any of the colas, but they might be good if you didn't grow up drinking Coke. These fruity pack drinks are not very natural tasting; I had high hopes for the Strawberry, but it not a true strawberry taste; the black cherry is so strong it's hardly drinkable, but I can't have sugar or regular soft drinks, so I'm just happy there's something to drink for a little treat in the afternoons. Note to Zevia makers: Please offer some drinks that are about half as sweet and flavored. They'll taste more like grown-up beverages.

I did a lot of reading and researching before buying this food for my dog. This seemed to be the most nutritious at the best price per pound. We made a gradual change from her other food and she seems to be doing just fine on the new food.
The Taylors of Harrogate English Breakfast loose leaf Tea is a strong black tea - great flavor!

Wow, I actually enjoyed eating this cereal. When I finished eating, I told my roommate to try it, because it was that good. It kind of reminds me of a fig newton cinnamon cookie I ate recently. The good thing about it is that cinnamon is not overpowering like Cinnamon Toast Crunch. It's not too sweet, but it's just right, probably because the amount of wheat in each bite. I will definitely be eating this for breakfast this week. I'm going to have to add this to my shopping list, when it's time to buy cereal again.

review_title: The best... if you like chili hot, not cheesy
review_text: Just wonderful, but I understand some people's dissapointment, for it has no nacho taste. It doesn't taste like cheese. It is spicy hot like chili, which I love much more than nachos. So this is perfect for me. If you like hot chips, hot sauce, etc. I think you will really enjoy it.

Oh boy, These are a winner at my house. We used to buy them locally, but they are no longer carried. :(
My husband found these after trying other brands and these are the ones. My son loves them as well. They were delivered quickly and were fresh. They said they almost had a pop to them. We will definitely order these again. They are heavy, so shipping was a little high, although we hope they will come back to W.

My dog has never been willing to play with toys, or chew on things he couldn't just eat (i.e. food items that he is given. That is, until we lucked out and found the Kong Busy Buddy (large). He loves the darn thing. His face lights up, his tail starts wagging, he opens his mouth wide, grabs his offered Busy Buddy, and goes to town. It's some work to get to the treats and he seems to enjoy working the bone as much as eating the treat. We have actually bought several of these - for two reasons - one for when we travel, and one home, one for vacation. It is expensive, I'll admit, but for the delight it brings him, I'd have to say it is well worth it. Don't expect it to last very long (not the treats - which are gone pretty fast regardless, but the Busy Bone itself - if your dog has a strong jaw, it will eventually start showing serious wear, and the bristle may start wearing off). You can control that by keeping an eye on your dog and removing the Busy Buddy when the treat is gone and he's just chewing on it, but frankly, I don't have the heart. I'm happy to let him have his way with his Busy Buddy, and replace it once in a while. Bet your dog loves it too!

Yuck, yuck and yuck. I did not approve of these "noodles". Smelled awful and the texture was chewy and tough...really disgusting. Did not matter what type of sauce or soup I put them in, they were still gross. I wasted my money on a 20 pack and expensive shipping.

It's wonderful to be able to bake cakes and cookies, again. It was the only thing that I missed when I had to go gluten-free. I did not like any other GF cake flours in the market that I tried. I love this!
Delicious and unique flavor, great for those who like a little tart taste. Nice the have a 12 pack since they are pretty hard to find.
Great pasta!! make sure to boil in lots of water because it seems fresher than the local rock-hard store pasta.

review_title: An Ode to the Drink of the Gods...
review_text:
This Mango Nectar is perfection! It deserves the highest praise, and I feel compelled to be the one to give it.

First, it must be understood that this is a true delicacy and thus it is to be sipped and savored slowly, not gulped down indiscriminately like a can of coke. If you really want to get the most out of this true little slice of heaven, you have to address it unhurriedly , preferably with your eyes closed. It is best served refrigerated and I like to drink it straight out of the can, because even the can feels good, with its slim line and nice heft. It's actually quite a bit heavier than one expects... So, can or glass, take a sip and gently roll it around on your tongue, like you would a fine wine. Feel the thick richness of the nectar, dancing its dance of subtle, rich flavors in the hiddenmost recesses of your taste glands. Remember to breath gently through your mouth and nose too, to get the full effect of the subtle hues of this amazing fruit's aromas. Notice the tiniest little hint of bitterness - it really rounds out the "feel" of the mango. It no doubt comes from the pulp and, without it, this juice would not be nearly as delectable as it is.

Does this sound like poetry to you? Perhaps it seems like it is a somewhat overdone description of a product that is, after all, "only a fruit juice", right? Well, I invite you to try it yourself and see if it is not deserving of every accolade I have ascribed to it and many others I may have missed.

I am having one now and I must add, though it is probably fairly obvious, I feel it enhances my imagination and my creativity too... :)
THis is a great product for my husband's tea. He loves the convenience of it. Received it as promised. Good service.

I did the job! No moths for a weeks now! The instructions are not real good but if you read them carefully and not drop the little tab through the hole, but slid it under the tab until it drops, it will go where it should go. You may need to use the corner of the envelope the tab comes in to push it all the way through.

review_title: Bleh... cane juice is 3rd on ingred. list.
review_text:
I've had Amy and Brians coconut water - yum!, Vico's plain in the tetra pack - great! (the ones in the plastic bottle and some in the larger tetra packs are from concentrate - blah and yuck- don't get those!) , and the ones in the glass bottles- green cover- can't remember the name, but pure coconut water -great too.

This, one with pineapple- no good. The added cane juice is superfluous to the natural sweetness of coconut water and pineapple juice. It makes the water taste 'thicker' and not so healthy.

I wish these brands can just stick to the name of the drinks in their ingredients! (i.e. coconut water and pineapple juice! - no more!)

This is one of my all time favs from Maxwell House. It has an excellent flavor and I love it. The product was a little pricy on Amazon, but at least I could get it there. Can't find locally and I'm concerned that I'm not going to be able to get it in the near future.
I love, love, love this sause/marinade for meat. It makes the meat fall apart. I would buy it at my local store but they don't sell it anymore. I now buy it through the Kikkoman website. [...]

I got this for the crawl space under my parents cabin. I wanted something safe for when the kids are playing, but strong enough to chase away critters. My parents are mostly concerned about skunks and the occasional groundhog or woodchuck.

The odor is strong and peppery, but much better than skunk spray. I think you have to stay on top of applciations because the damp soil/earth will probbaly reduce the potency.

So far so good and it seems to be doing its job. I wish it were a little less expensive, but then again professionals are much more expensive.

I ordered this 35 K-Cup carousel in black for my son and in chrome for my husband. Both arrived in the two days stated and are even nicer in appearance than the photos showed. The carousels both swivel very easily and smoothly. They are the same height as the coffee maker and look really nice on the counter. I would recommend this product to anyone.

These work exactly as described. It took about a week before the Kefir tasted the way I like it, but now it's great. I experimented a little with the timing, but prefer approximately 24 hours per batch. The instructions were fine and they offered a phone number for questions.

My favorite part about this product is the smell. It's summery and smells like coconut and vanilla. I used about a quarter sized amount on my scalp and rubbed in it and I think that may have been a little too much. The thing is that there are basically no instructions. It doesn't say how much to use or when is the best time to use it or even if it's a leave in product. The only thing it says is "massage into scalp and hair" and you have to lift the label to even find that. Maybe they think that everyone would just know what to do and how much to use, but I think the product could benefit from some instructions.

I HAVE NEVER MET A POTATO CHIP I DIDN'T LIKE. I HAVE NEVER MET A
POTATO CHIP I haven't eaten...except, perhaps, at parties, where I
had to restrain myself from eating all the potato chips laid out,
lest I leave a bad impression with host, hostess, and fellow guests!

Yes, I must admit it. Potato chips, (along with Three Musketteers
Bars -- also reviewed by me for Amazon), are my very, VERY favourite
snack....and have been, since childhood! Being a "P.C.A." (potato-
chip affictionado), has it's down-side...but it also has it's re-
wards. For instance, though I have never smoked, and never been a
drug-addict, I feel I can more easily understand the agony of
oeople trying to "kick" these habits go through, which also gives
me empathy for problems of all other people, all over the world,
as well! (Should a group be formed, called "Potato Chip Addicts
For Better World Understanding"? Hmmm......perhaps not. Then
again.......)

Of course, the most obvious disadvantage to eating potato-chips
is that doing so tends put pounds on the eater of those potato
chips. So -- many manufacturers have come up with "Light", or
"Reduced Calorie" potato chips. As are the potato chips being
reviewed here: PRINGLES LIGHT SOUR CREAM AND ONION Potato Chips.

O.K. -- they taste GREAT! And, although the side of the
package, (printed in both English and Spanish), lists the sodium
content as 190 mgs per serving, (which seems a lot, though right
now I have no other type of potato chip package to which to
compare it), the salt flavour -- though very prominent, (and
delicious!), was not as over-whelming as in other potato chips I
have had. Thus, the thirst brought on by many other potato chips
I have eaten was not as strong. The sour cream and onions in
these potato chips took over much of the flavour-enhancement,
so, I guess, an overwhelming amount of salt was not necessary.
This, as Martha Stewart might say, is definitely a "good thing".
Because, quenching one's thirst, brought on by eating, (other)
too-salty potato chips usually only makes room for MORE potato
chips in one's appetite. So, you might think that these, some-
what less salty potato chips would be easier to stop eating than
other potato chips. Well -- in my case at least -- you would be
wrong. Because -- with OR without a drink in between bites --
they just taste so darn good!

Why then, do I give these potato chips -- which are fat-free,
contain 50% fewer calories than regular potato chips....and which
do taste S O good -- only three stars? Sadly, because of several
of the ingredients listed on the container. (Had I been able to
read these ahead of time, on Amazon, I might have gotten another
type and/or flavour, of potato chip.)

The full ingredient list for these pototo chips is as follows:

Dried Potatos
Olestra, (Olean Brand)
Modified Cornstarch
Maltodextrin and Rice Flour,

Contains 2% or less of
Non-fat milk
Buttermilk *
Sour Cream Solids * *Cultured cream, non-fat milk)
Salt
Onion Powder
Whey
Dextrose
Monosodium Glutinate
Citric Acid
Lactic Acid
Natural and Artificial Flavours
Disodium Guanylate
Disodium Insinate
Polyglycerol Esters *
Mono- and DiGlycerides *
Alpha Topcopheral Acetate (Vitamin E)
Topcopherals (To Protect Flavour)
Vitamin A Palmitate **
Vitamin K **
And
Vitamin D **
....................CONTAINS MILK INGREDIENTS.................
* Adds a trivial amount of fat ** Dietarily Insignificant

What, you may ask, are so many vitamins doing in a package of potato
chips? The answer is that, to make these chips less caloric, (70 calories per ounce), the fairly-new, artifical fat, OLESTRA, is used.
Olestra, (here with the "Olean" brand name), caused a bit of controversy a few years back when it was first discovered. As I remember it, Olestrra
takes fat out of the body, all right -- but if any other food is eaten with it, the VITAMINS in the food, (either treated with, or eaten with, foods made with Olestra), are also flushed out of the body, before they can give any nutrition! So, the FDA has, to the best of my recollection, mandated that vitamins, (mostly artifical, synthetic vitamins) must be added to foods made with Olestra. And ONLY snack foods, such as these potato chips, can use Olestra at all.

MOST of the other ingredients above, are also nothing to smile about: "disodium guanylate"? "disodium inosinate"? The late consumer
reporter, BETTY FURNESS, once advised her viewers, "If you can't pronounce it, don't eat it!" This is good advice! Sadly, however, other ingredients like "monosodium glutamate", and "mono- and diglycerides", have become SO common in packaged foods today, that most people CAN pronounce these words. Without, however, knowing what they actually mean....

Upon first looking at the ingredients, I THOUGHT they also contained
"Cottonseed oil". Re-reading them, for this review, I am happy to report that Cottonseed Oil is NOT present here. (With "Olestra" as an oil, I guess Cottonseed oil wasn't necessaru.) In passing, however, I would like to mention something I read in the excellent consumer book, "The Supermarket Handbook" -- published in the '70s or '80s. This book, by Nikki and David Goldbeck, is truly "an oldie but a goodie"....and is must reading for people who want to be aware of what they eat, even in the 21st century! In it, the Goldbecks state that: "Cottonseed Oil is not fit for Human Consumption." Why? Because cottonseed oil comes, obviously, from the cotton plant. And -- since cotton is usually used for clothes, and not for food, (except for the oil), THE COTTON PLANT CAN BE SPRAYED WITH ALL SORTS OF PESTISIDES NOT ALLOWED TO BE SPRAYED ON PLANTS USED FOR FOOD! I'm really glad that PRINGLES LIGHT SOUR CREAM AND ONION Potato chips do NOT contain cottonseed oil, (as first I thought they did)....but, looking at the facts that stack up against the frying medium that IS used in these potato chips, (Olestra / Olean), one wonders if the manufacturers have just substituted one bad ingredient for another....

PRINGLES does make some very, very good potato chips. The original has the OU of the (Jewish) Orthodox Union, certifying that they are Kosher -- as, also, do several other PRINGLES potato chips, if I remember correctly. BUT ALL OF THESE ARE TNE REGULAR, FULL-FAT VERSIONS. Any potato chip will make you fat, if eaten to excess....but why lose your vitamins at the same time? (Strange things also seem to happen, when one ingests Olean, to the digestive tract...) For my money, (and life!), I think I'll stick to BAKED Potato Chips, and, perhaps, even the regular versions, from time to time, (to save money), of any Potato chips, from now on.

I did, in fact, call up PRINGLES, and mentioned that I'd like to see them make the Baked potato chips I had seen other manufacturers. The gentleman who took my call said he would pass my suggestion on to marketing.

Here's hoping!!!!

Stumbled upon these at TJMAXX and now I'm hooked. These cracker size snacks are nicely flavored - perfect for any sliced cheese. I like the mild rosemary flavor so well, that I like it with a mild cheese. Top it with some chopped sun-dried tomato and you have a great appetizer.

these are my cats fav and they are the best for cats! buy them!

They syrup was much cheaper on Amazon than the local retailer. It tasted very good on pancakes; however, it was too much syrup for a single person. My syrup went bad before I could finish the bottle, but that is no fault of the syrup.

I love these chips. They are crunchy and they don't crumble in to little pieces in the bag. I truely believe that Barbeque Popchips taste better than any other Barbeque chips on the market.

I have no children, well I do but they are grown. This was suggested by my dog's vet, the Pumpkin settles their stomach and the apple is just a bonus but she gets a couple tablespoons mixed in her food and she loves it. Yes, I know SPOILED.

I have to say, I'm definitely looking for a deal when it comes to baby food and this is one. Compared to the store prices even with coupons, buying by the case is a great buy.

review_text: I started taking garden of life extra virgin coconut oil and was extreamly impressed.The product arrived quickly,packaged well.The taste and consistency is superior.I accidentally ordered another brand and it did not come close to this product.This is well worth the money.It is great to cook with,love it on my skin and had the delightful surprise of losing 5 pounds and curbing my appetite!I just ordered another because I do not want to run out.Highly recommend.

review_title: Pretty good, but I still prefer Stevia
review_text:
In the last year I've switched from saccharine, NutraSweet and Splenda to more natural, low-carb or no-carb sweeteners. I've read too many bad things about the artificial ones, and my low-carb diet doesn't allow sugar, honey or agave nectar. I'm in love with liquid stevia, because it works equally well in hot or cold beverages, and also bakes well. It's somewhat expensive, but I feel confident that it's not poisoning me.

Nectresse Natural No-Calorie Sweetener is a close second to Stevia in my personal preferences. I found it to be easy to use in measured packets, and has a similar consistency to table sugar. It sweetens well, although I thought it had a strange aftertaste (but some people say the same thing about Stevia). It's also less expensive per serving than Stevia.

I will probably look for this product again, when my box is empty. It's nice to have several options for natural non-caloric sweeteners. But I still prefer Stevia.
We are grateful to have a source that isn't outrageously expensive. And we looked up pizel, which we recommend that you don't really.

We gave Pur Luv Grande Bones to our Golden Doodle and Golden Retriever. They loved eating them but both vomited up chunks of hard undigested pieces of these bones the next day. We will not be buying these again.

review_title: Tasty but could be more flavorful
review_text: The cake mix quality is very good, but the French Vanilla flavor was very subtle. If they added a bit more flavoring I would give it a better rating.

I've been ordering these Almond & Coconut bars from Amazon for a year or so and they've always been very chewy and great tasting, however, the latest shipment I received were very hard to bite and chew and I have no idea who's at fault, Amazon or KIND?

review_title: Good, but get the right size
review_text:
We got the smallest size for our maltese/bichon mix who is about 13 lbs, and he was able to pop out the 'cap' within minutes... and we are pretty sure he ate the whole cap. So then we went out and got the large size, and he is IN LOVE. He's actually so addicted to it, I worry a bit! Moral to the story is, make sure you get a size large enough that your dog cannot squeeze the entire thing to pop out the cap!

My other little dog (6 lb yorkiepoo) likes the smallest size just fine, but doesn't seem to care a whole lot for the 'caps' themselves; instead he likes it when I stuff Bil Jac treats into the ball.

Both are pretty destructive chewers, but so far so good. Personally I find the caps stinky and it smells up the room... but if it makes my boyz happy, then I'm willing to tolerate the smell.
It has been 30+ yrs since I last enjoyed this candy :) Glad to have it back

This is really awesome chili. Preperation time is kinda long. But, of course, anything that turns out this great is worth waiting for. It's very important that you soak the beans overnight, occasionaly changing the water and removing any foreign materials (floaties). I alter the recipe slightly by adding some fresh sarrano peppers, sliced and sauted along with the onion and garlic. Also, I substitute two of the four cans of stewed tomatoes, using instead two cans of diced tomatoes, one w/green chilis, the other w/habeneros. And, I like my chili HOT so I shake-in a generous amount of "ASS KICKIN' Hot Sauce". Once all ingredients are mixed together, I find it best to allow the chili to simmer over low heat for at least 3 hours, usually 4 or 5. The longer the better. I've got family and friends that beg for me to make this chili. Somehow, after eating this stuff, you get this feeling of elation and calm, peace. It really makes you feel good. However, those who don't LOVE hot spicy chili should not even try one bite as they WILL suffer.

I was shocked to find out that I received 20 packages of what looks like about 8 pappadums in a package! Not what I was expecting! I usually buy a package of 10 as needed; not 160 pappadums at a time!!!! The vendor needs to not list the weight, but rather the quantity of pappadums in each package! Now what do I do with this many pappadums all at once!!!!
The bottles were both leaking badly; about half the product had leaked through the bottom of the box. Unfortunately they cannot be returned, so I just wasted money ordering this.

I have an old Chocolate Lab that has to take 3 different pills a day. She would spit the pills out if I hid them in cheese, cream cheese, etc. I purchased pill pockets and I am now able to feed her her pills and she doesn't spit them out. I have used both chicken & beef flavors and she loves them both, it is like another treat!

Have been using Core products for several years. I supplement dry food with a little canned food and I prefer grain free for my dogs. I've priced compared in several locations and I have not found a better deal anywhere else.
Speedy shipment on this product...have not tried it yet but the quality, packaging and so forth seem very good.

Having tried several brands of gluten-free pasta, this is hands down the best available. My son has celiac disease and this pasta tastes like "the real thing" the others in my family cannot tell that it is gluten-free. It is somewhat more expensive since it is imported but it is worth the cost and is less expensive to purchase at Amazon.

review_title: My dog will eat everything, except for this.
review_text: My dog NEVER refuses food. For years she'll eat pretty much anything, but not this. That, combined with some of the other frightening customer reviews, worries me. Maybe it was once good and they changed the formula, or maybe my experience is just a fluke. But for whatever reason, my hungry dog would rather eat just about anything that I've ever given her instead of this food.

review_title: Excellent Tea!!!! Please let us have it again!!!
review_text:
This is an excellent tea in a true bargain price.

Theodora
