review_text: I love baking with the Presto Cake flour. I am so happy I don't have to worry about the salt and baking powder. I bake about l0 cakes a month for the rescue.

review_title: My favorite lollipops of all time
review_text:
I was really disappointed when the WalGreens and grocery stores around me stopped carrying these. They have been my favorite lollipops since I was about twelve years old.

For those buying blind, let me just clarify once and for all: THESE LOLLIPOPS ARE FLAT! THEY ARE NOT ROUNDED LIKE A TOOTSIE POP OR A DUM-DUM.

The actual hard candy part of the lollipop is a delicious granny smith apple flavor unlike any other candy out there, with a very satisfying, crisp tartness. On the outside, the Tootsie Roll company has slopped a generous spoonful of sweet caramel, and yes, this does tend to make the shape of the lollipop undulate a little bit. The shape of one pop isn't going to be consistent to the next.

If that bothers you, well... I'll be honest, I find that a really weird thing to hold against a lollipop. Either way, the real draw here is the taste. These things are so good that, despite them not being available in my area anymore, I am willing to online and spend shipping & handling to get them. That should say something.

I recently purchased a box of these cookies at my local grocery store because I have to regulate my blood sugar, but sometimes I just need a sweet treat to satisfy my sweet tooth. I honestly thought these were going to taste like cardboard, but I was pleasantly surprised! They are very coconut-y, so if you love macaroons, you'll love these cookies.

These cookies are slightly soft, but not chewy, and I don't feel deprived of "normal" cookies when I eat them. Best of all, my blood sugar doesn't go haywire after eating them! They use fructose rather than aspartame, so people who can't consume phenylalanine can eat these, unlike other low glycemic products.

The serving size on the box is 4 cookies which is good because I usually feel like my sweet tooth is satisfied after just 2 cookies, and 4 cookies is a REAL treat!

My husband and I absolutely LOVE Copper Moon Kona Blend. We used to buy it at SAM's under a different label and it was ground, but they stopped carrying it. We tried lots of different coffees trying to find one we liked as well for a couple of months. Then I found Cooper Moon coffee online. Now we buy the whole bean Kona and grind it fresh every morning. It smells wonderful when it's being ground and is great to wake up with every morning.

Amazing buy on Splenda! The savings compared to the store was unbelievable. I use it since I'm diabetic, but the taste is great and I can still get that sugar taste with no bitter after taste. The packets make it convienant to take along with me. Thank-you Amazon!
this is probibly my favorite honey bun, but it's not on the amazon prime free shipping,which is the reason i might not order again..i know i know ,i'm cheap...lol

I first bought Coconut oil at the health food store and spent ten bucks for a 16 ounce container. Once I realized the flexibility and benefits of coconut oil, I wanted a better price. This is it. Though this price varies (I've spent in the range 35-45 dollars for 128 ounces on Amazon which amounts to a significant drop in cost to what I paid locally.)the price is right.

I've had one container that had hard, tiny beads of coconut oil, but it still did what it was supposed to do, though they were a little more resistant to melting. Otherwise, in the three batches we've purchased, this is the only minor complaint.

I use it to replace shortening, or to fry, and it's perfect for baking. The coconut flavor is there, but it's subtle. If you hate the flavor of coconut you might want to think twice. I thought I did, but the more I started thinking along the lines of embracing coconut I realized the texture of shredded coconut was what I had issues with. Coconut oil makes delicious stove popped popcorn that doesn't need butter for more flavor ...it ends up with kind of a sweet/buttery taste. Cookies, brownies, etc are delicious with coconut oil replacing butter or margarine.

This product is also my only moisturizer and lotion of choice. We scoop some out of the main container (into a recycled hummus jar, short, with a wide mouth) and store it in the bathroom. This past winter, before I started using coconut oil as a moisturizer/lotion, my skin was painfully dry. I drink lots of water, and I was using different products, but my skin was not happy. Seriously, Coconut oil is the best. It soaks in quickly, though not immediately, and it really took care of the itchy dry. I was a little more concerned about my face. But my skin was so dry I felt like smiling would crack my face, so I dove in and tried it. Perfect. Again, it doesn't soak in immediately. I put it on, get dressed, do my hair, then apply my makeup. My foundation brush has sucked up some of the oil so I'll need to replace those maybe sooner than I would otherwise. But for a facial moisturizer that works as well as anything I've ever tried and costs about $.35 an ounce...I think I can live with that. I also haven't had any clogging of pores and I'm an aging T-Zone skin.
I have had Honeybush tea bought in South Africa. This stuff is horrid with no flavor. Will not buy again. My fault for seeing a deal, more like a steal of my money.

We've been drinking Rooibus tea since discovering it in Africa many years ago. Now, with a Keurig, I've been ordering all sorts of tea and was pleased when this rooibus was offered. I thought it would taste o.k. but sort of ho-hum/nothing special. Well, I was wrong! This tea is an absolute zinger (to borrow the title of another tea). The taste is great and we've been drinking it at every opportunity.

This coffee is rich and tastes great! Served it to friends who do not like "decaf" and they had no idea that this was a decaf. The flavor is really good. I took off a star because it is not as aromatic as the Nantucket blends. To me, a coffee should have a coffee aroma when brewing and therefore making my anticipation greater. Also, the fragrance of brewing coffee reminds me of my Grandma making (remember this?) perked coffee; and, truly, this is a good thing.

review_title: These are the BEST sour gummies!
review_text: I thought the five-flavor sour gummies(in the green bag) was fantastic. Then I tried the mix o reds, and now the red ones are all I want. This is my addiction - they are SO good! Perfectly sour, and perfectly juicy... perfectly addictive! I'd buy them here, but this is a ridiculously high price for this candy. The grocery store usually has them for $1.50 or $1.75 per pack, and occasionally, $1 per pack. Now do the math on these (divide by 12, and...whatever!).
This is very good chai if used properly. Each tea bag makes two mugs of tea. Used this way you get the fullest flavor in each cup. It's only topped by loose chai.
I found Harney & Sons tea about 3 years ago. I love this tea! I've tried a lot of other brands and have not found one that comes close to the flavor of H & S.

review_title: Best of all fat free blue cheese
review_text: Most of the other brands are too bitter... This one has a milder flavor and stays creamy... The prices are great and I will be reordering.

Green Mountain Southern Sweet Tea is as good if not better than most K-Cup teas. Being black tea, it has that strong flavor one expects to find in Black Tea. The deliverly was prompt and the packaging was in perfect condition. I will certainly order again.

Most marmalades are so sugary that they mask the underlying bitterness of the citrus. This one puts the bitterness on display, to good effect. This is a real marmalade, and not an orange-colored jelly. Great on buttered toast.
This is my second time buying this product here. I believe this is the best value for my money.

review_title: Great price, not so great taste
review_text: I use coconut oil on a daily basis for everything from frying to making my own mayo. I purchased this oil because it seemed like a great price, and it is inexpensive. However, it has a strange flavor. I was expecting a strong coconut flavor, which is fine, but in reality it's a strong chemical/coconut flavor that overpowers other flavors unless the dish is highly spiced. I've tried this oil in at least 10 different recipes with the same results. There's a weird taste that can't be overlooked. I'm disappointed but I won't be purchasing this again.

not much flavor but at least it doesn't taste bad. Does help breath to smell better, makes your breath "clearer". It has a extremely mild spearmint like taste that last 3 minutes then it's just plain white gum. 4 tongue scraper reviews [...]

This is a wonderful product. My grandaughter is almost 9 years old and up until a couple of months ago had never eaten a piece of bread. She has severe food allergies and is very limited as to what she can eat. Although she won't eat this bread unless it is toasted, I consider it a wonderful addition to her diet. I will continue to order this product.
I ordered Haribo Black Licorice Wheels and it arrived on time and packed in good condition. The product was fresh and I was very satisfied with the product and price.
I love the lavazza brand of coffee. I liked this roast ok, but i would recommend buy the rosa over this roast.
There is nothing like Celtic Salt. I have tried a few types of gourmet salt, but none have the mellow taste of Celtic.

Perfect Snack....

What's not to love? Apricots, Almonds, and Coconut....life is so-o-o kind. Just so happens that this snack (MINI) is perfect to take along when you go shopping....delicious and keeps you from turning into a fast food lane for a fast food fix.....you already got the best one. Almost a candy bar without the bad stuff. The regular size can fill you up for lunch w. a glass of milk or? This bar is so TASTY! Gluten free too! I had to go on auto-delivery. Just Saying.....how I feel. annamc(MS)

This Old Dominion Peanut Brittle tastes fine the way it is but... ever since my teeth fell apart and several expensive dentist/oral surgeon appointments were mandatory (along with a couple emergency surgeries and potential hospital visits if said oral surgeon wasn't working at the time- thank God it never got to THAT point and he hadn't gone home yet!) I haven't really been feeling much of a desire or craving for brittle. In fact just the name of it makes my teeth quiver. Just the thought of biting down on peanut brittle sends a sharp chill through the few teeth that have remained. My imagination runs wild and I think about what would happen if my teeth were to suddenly shatter. No more eating anything. Anyway, this is actually really good brittle. Just... I can't eat it anymore. :( Alright, maybe I can still slide a little bit of brittle in my mouth when I'm in one of my "Who cares how my teeth feel tomorrow?" moods, but these are very rare times. :)

This tea is simple with a pretty fair hint of peach. We sun brew it and counter brew it. I THINK the counter brew makes the tea taste even better. We once found it at the local WALMART but no more. I quit alcohol a year ago( 30 year drinker) and this tea, with a fair amount of sugar added, is all i drank for months. It helped me ALOT. After drinking this tea, it's all my wife and I drink. She also quit alcohol as well. Now we don't drink the tea to replace anything anymore. After quitting alcohol for over a year now we drink the tea cause it tastes teriffic. The case of tea route is cheaper than even Walmart provided.

review_title: Love it love it love it
review_text: I love flavored coffees. I add this along with a jet keurig and it's perfect. This is the best vanilla out there as I've been experimenting.

I ordered this from AmericaRX and it was excellent---swift delivery, mint condition, and fresh bars in a sealed box that arrived one year before its' printed expiration date. Oh, and did I mention that we're talking about Milky Way-Rich Chocolate Creamy Caramel candy? It's all good!

Invisible Cherry is Delicious!!!

I tried the Kool Aid Fruit Punch a week ago (red in color), and I think it is what made my gums hurt.

Someone told me that red dye can bother teeth. I think this might be true.

Also good are:
Country Time Lemonade and
Lipton Green Tea - has caffeine I think (as it's tea), but label doesn't say that, don't drink after 12 pm (kept me up one night), was able to substitute this for coffee, and kick the coffee habit
This is a great product! I bought them to fill my son's goody bags for his 1st birthday party! Great price and fast delivery! Will purchase again.

My beagle loves these bones. We give them to her every sunday as a treat after clipping nails, getting a bath or cleaning her ears. She gets so excited when I pull one out of the bag. She loves them so much that I have signed up for subscribe and save to receive them every month.

This candy is great! Brings back Childhood memories. I love it!
This also came earlier than expected, so I got a surprise. Can't find these anywhere around here! !

This rice flour is fine in a pinch, but it is too coarsly ground. Other brands offer a finer grind. Coarsly ground flour makes for a very dry baked product, as it is unable to absorb the moisture as well.
The product is great, and I've been using it for years, but you can purchase it way cheaper from the website..vemma.com and pay about $2.80 per can.

The picture displayed for this product is DECEIVING. I'm still looking for all those almonds and juicy looking raisins among other things in the picture. I found waaaay toooo many sunflower seeds for the price of this product. The sunflower seeds were good and fresh. I CANNOT cost justify buying this item. I won't purchase this again.

BUT...

My son rated this 3-Star because of all the seeds and their freshness, HE wants it again! I rated it 1-Star because of all the seeds. We split the difference and rated it 2-Star...to each their own.

UPDATE:

I ordered AGAIN! The second order has the pictured blend of sunflower & pumpkin seeds, juicy raisins, almonds, cashew pieces all fresh. I'd give this batch 5 Stars. The inconsistent mixture in each order and price point makes it difficult to give the product more than 3-Stars.

I'm addicted...I ordered TWO MORE TIMES and the mixture is more consistent with a great blend of ingredients.

review_title: All Natural, but a Little Bland
review_text:
Usually, I love a sweet/salty combo in the right ratio, and these bars had that. Not too salty, not too sweet, just a little of each.

The ingredients are all natural, and include organic peanuts, raisins, brown rice syrup, chia seeds, molasses, sea salt, and so on. Each 1.5 oz bar has 200 calories. Nothing bad here.

Except. Even with the good ratio of sweet/salty, and even with the fine mix of natural, organic ingredients, the flavor is on the bland side.

Maybe I was expecting them to taste more like a candy bar, or maybe I'm simply not used to organic ingredients (do they taste different?) but I just didn't fall in love with the taste of these.

Still, I give them four stars, because of the healthy ingredients they contain.

This is the only food my cat will eat. She is very picky. Since eating this better, organic food exclusively, she has had much better health. (She is quite an old cat.) For some reason the "Turkey Formula" flavor is her favorite. If I try out a different food, she runs up and down the hallway yelling, until I give her "Newman's Own" canned (turkey flavor) food again. (I never try out new foods with her anymore.) :) Must be good stuff! BTW: I also add in fresh organic greens and green powders for her too. She loves it!

These are very good, high quality Garbanzo Beans. I purchased these Garbanzo Beans for making raw hummus with, and I was not disappointed. They are very large and very good. They don't have that "off" taste that some garbanzo beans have. They make the best raw hummus I have ever made. They arrived plastic bag, inside a nice burlap sack. The beans were very clean and I have yet to come across a bad bean.

High quality bean, excellent taste. You can't beat the price, and 5 lbs. goes a very long way!

I would highly recommend this product.

I have used the Brooks Chili Beans to make my Chili for over 20 years. I am not a great cook, but people have always raved about my chili. When we recently moved to the east coast, I completely panicked when I realized the stores here do not carry my Brooks Beans. I made my chili with different beans and it was just not the same. I was so excited to find them through Amazon. The shipping cost is about the same as the cost of the beans, but the extra cost is well worth it! You can not beat the taste of the
special sauce!

review_title: These Spring rolls are made with a weird tasting sauce!
review_text: I guess I was looking for steak and cheese spring rolls but these did not have any cheese flavoring. Instead, they applied this awful sauce that ruined the whole roll. Don't get me wrong, the meat was tender and delicious but as a complete package....goodness that sauce ruined the whole taste experience. I won't be buying this particular product ever again but you may like the taste of this sauce so....give it a try once, like I did!
I pop corn at least once a week and this oil is the best. I have always used peanut oil and it works great but i like the way this oil makes the corn yellow. It is not a liquid.

This tasted very good, but i'm not a fan of shredded jerky like this.

be careful opening the lids i almost spilled one cause i didn't cut the label all the way.
The Parachute 100% Pure Coconut Oil 500ml is an excellent product & the price & free shipping on Amazon makes it an even better deal!

Oh Holy Granola, Batman! This granola is basically dessert. It has granola that is basically lightly covered in cocoa, mini dark chocolate bars, and freeze dried strawberries and raspberries. The granola pieces are mostly pretty pulverized (possibly a result of the product coming in a bag, but the pieces are pretty small regardless), but there are some larger chunks of granola. The cocoa flavor on the granola is not overwhelming or overly sweet, but rather just a perfect amount of flavor added. The miniature chocolate bars are a delightful addition and a wonderful little treat when you get to them. I didn't have much opinion on the strawberries and raspberries, though; they didn't really taste like much other than chocolate once all was said and done. I don't like my granola in milk, so I just ate it by the handful and in some yogurt and thought it was great both ways. The other day I took a snack bag full of it to work for a snack.

I love the fact that the company matches sales with donations to food banks up to $1 million. It is nice to see globally conscious companies trying to help the world fight hunger. Add that to yummy granola and you have me as a loyal customer! (PS Now I have to hide it from my husband or he eats it all and I get none... never had to fight him for granola before!).

I picked these up in a bulk grocery department while out-of-town. I was looking for a pressed dextrose candy that was hard enough not to melt immediately but that would soften fairly shortly in the mouth. These have fit the bill perfectly. Similar in flavor to Runts (especially the yellow fish, which are banana-flavored) but easier to bite due to their shape. The coating has a good texture and dissolves without becoming grainy, which can be rough on tender mouths. Each candy remains smooth until completely dissolved, which is a sign of a fine, high-quality dextrose inside and a coating that is not glopped on in the production.

Each color has its own flavor, with the green being the tartest and the yellow being the least. As someone who is not a fan of tart candy, I did not find the green to be too tart. If you're looking for sour candies, try one of the other lines from Oak Leaf for something with the same quality. I look forward to trying some of their other pressed dextrose products, especially the Banana Heads, and would highly recommend these Aquarium Fish to anyone. As a bonus for those of us with allergies, they are produced in a peanut- and tree nut-free facility and are OU Kosher certified.

I'm comfortable making homemade pizza crust from wheat flour so I just did the same things I always have with great success.

I used half the bag for one crust and it was LARGE. I used the whole yeast pack even for half the mix. I have other yeast for next time. Mix the wet and dry ,the dough should not be wet or you can't roll it out good. Instead of rising the dough in the bowl, I greased my hands with olive oil (don't use water) put the dough on a cold, oiled pizza stone, flipped the dough ball over, rolled thin with an oiled rolling pin, made an edge around then let it rest for about 15 min. I sprinkled garlic powder, oregano and basil all over the raw dough. I baked for 10 min, let it cool a little then topped (dont over sauce,it'll be soggy) and finished cooking until very crisp. It was very good but even better after reheating the next day...even more crisp. I thought it was going to over cook but its better that way. I would buy this again. Its the first gluten free pizza I have ever had. The taste is just as good as a wheat crust! I was very happy with the pizza as were my husband and child.
The herbal mate tea Bolivia stores sells is a health benefit from high blood pressure to a cure for the gastro-intestinal ailment I have been plauged with all my life.

review_title: Great for dogs with tender stomachs
review_text:
Our Golden Retriever has had a tender stomach since he was a puppy. He had many episodes of diarrhea and vomiting. A thorough checkout with the vet revealed no other causes other than food intolerance. We went through many different brands. He would always eventually become intolerant. Then, a few years ago, we found Nature's Variety Prairie. Problem solved. Our Aussie loves it too.

Now, by subscribing, we save quite a bit per bag when compared to buying it from pet supply shops.

I received it today, was thinking it was going to be in a bigger bottle from what it showed online, the bottle looks online like a gallon bottle, but is only 2.6L but is in concentrate. I hope it is what I am looking for. I have been having cravings for peach tea, hoping this does the trick. Upon trying it, it has the taste of a tart peach flavoring, not right for peach tea.

I thought my world of pancakes and cookies was over until I found this mix. Holy cow, this mix makes the best pancakes and chocolate chip cookies ever! There are several easy recipes on the side of the bag and I've found the flavor of everything to be equal to the beloved wheat recipes I used to use. I'm so happy I can eat my favorites again!
The soup is a little watery but it is convenient when you are in a hurry. Fair value when purchased during a promotion.

Lurid...weak, chemical tasting all describes this K-Cup. French Vanilla is not the best flavor but Van Houttes makes it seem like the worst. If you like weak, chem-tasting coffee then you will love this!
If you like blueberry you will love this product! This coffee is great on a whole new level! It has great flavor and works with any Keurig type of brewer.

I always like Almond Joy but hated the almonds. Bounty is the solution! When I saw them in World Market I bought a bunch and ate them all in less than a week. They are sooooooooooo good. Easily one of my favorite candy bars. Highly recommended.

Great product but Amazon needs to ship it sealed and by itself.I ordered the coarse sea salt twice and both time something has happened to the shipment.First time one of the bags where broken and was leaking out of the box and the UPS driver said when he delivered whatever is in that box is now all over my truck and left a path from the truck to my door.So I ordered it a second time and was shipped with cleaning products and it leaked all over the whole shipment and this time I ask Amazon to replace it Amazon gladly replaced it and shipped replacement over night.

This product is wonderful and a great buy. I use the subscription service to get an even better price. I use this sugar for baking as well as for cereal etc. When I bake with it, I turn it into a powder by putting it in my blender. That way it disolves easier in cookies, muffins and other baked goods.

We enjoy the French Roast flavor from this maker mainly for the aroma and rich taste. Great for a morning cup. Initially we were worried about drip risks due to the pod's design, but never had a problem. Having the paper filter exposed might be the cause for the richer taste, and some minimal sediment does get past the filter. Not enough to be troublesome. This coffee has been the best value k-cups thus far, and with the Green Coffee patent expired, hopefully we will see prices go down even more, which will lead to more consumption!

This is an instant powder that you mix with hot water. The strongest flavor by far is ginger, which has a nice, powerful bite to it. Behind that, I can taste some lemon and honey flavors, and the aftertaste is mostly lemon and honey. The lemon and honey has a little bit of an "artificial" taste to it, but not terrible.

This would clear your sinuses well, and if a drink made from a lot of ginger and a little lemon and honey sounds good to you, you will probably enjoy it. Still, I think that I could do better with real ginger (either grated or jarred), lemon juice, and honey.

I was expecting a coffee like this to have a some flavor, but it is incredibly weak and tastes like gas station coffee with crema. As a coffee drinker, I don't tend to be someone that drinks really bold coffee (e.g. starbucks bold), but this is just TOO weak for me even.

Won't buy again.
This review is based on 9GreenBox taking care of their customers. If you receive an item that you consider to be subpar they will make it right. Highly recommend this retailer.

I discovered this grape juice in Napa while pregnant. Now I buy it in bulk (to help with shipping) to take with me to Holiday parties. I also bring it when we are at nice restaurants and have the waiter put it in a wine glass. All the restaurants have been accommodating so far! The Pinot Noir is the best, then Chardonnay, the Rose is okay. I like it because it is not super sweet.

I tried (nearly) all the non-alcoholic wine, they were terrible. This soda is the perfect substitute!

I was so happy when I found this product on Amazon, because in Europe this is a common cereal babies are given. I was in Hungary in spring so I bought a couple of boxes but those did not last long. My son just loves this for breakfast or dinner. I could not understand why Gerber cereals are so common they tastes so bad especially mixed with water. And I am not giving formula to my breastfed baby.
So, I am really really happy that this product is available online. Saved my baby's and my life :)))))
Thank you!
It seemed like it would be a good idea, but my dog could not get the treats out. She is tiny and the extra small was way too big for her. I like the IQ ball way better.

I found this at a Costco over the summer, but my local Costco doesn't have it. I was happy to find it on Amazon because I love it! Sooo tasty! There are some smaller, thinner slices, as well as some nice, thick, chewy bits. I put it into my home-made trail mix for some added sweetness.

review_title: yes it's delicious, but be informed
review_text:
from wikipedia: In the United States, Castoreum has been approved by the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) as a food additive, often referenced simply as a "natural flavoring" in the product's list of ingredients. It is commonly used in both food and beverages, especially as vanilla and raspberry flavoring.

Castoreum (pronunciation: /kæ'st'ri'm/) is the exudate from the castor sacs of the mature North American Beaver Castor canadensis and the European Beaver Castor fiber. Within the zoological realm, castoreum is the yellowish secretion of the castor sac in combination with the beaver's urine, used during scent marking of territory. Both male and female beavers possess a pair of castor sacs and a pair of anal glands located in two cavities under the skin between the pelvis and the base of the tail. The castor sacs are not true glands (endocrine or exocrine) on a cellular level, hence references to these structures as preputial glands or castor glands are misnomers.

/wikipedia entry

i USED to love raspberry flavored everything, and used the heck out of this extract. i always assumed the natural flavorings had something to do with raspberries, not beaver butt.

review_title: Tastes too good to be healthy but it is!
review_text: These delicious little nuggets are so yummy- everyone in my house fights over them, humans and chinchillas alike (they were bought for the chins until the humans realized that they were so good). I love dried fruit, especially pineapple, but it doesn't satisfy the need for crunchy snacks the way this does, and it is hard to find dried pineapple without sugar added to it. Usually freeze dried fruit has a powdery texture/taste, but this is different tasting - similar to those 'dried' banana chips that are actually fried and worse for you than potato chips. Crunchy-n-Yummy has a taste that makes you sure that they are lying about it being sugar free and simply dried-but it really is just dried pineapple, and one of the best snacks I have tried in a long time.

review_title: These things aren't cheap, but boy are they good!
review_text: I love these fruit snacks. It is a much better alternative than the occasional popcorn and potota chips. I have heard they are very healthy for you and they taste awesome. Of course quality comes with a price at 15.00 with free shipping if you spend 25.00. 15.00 isn't a horrible price because these things taste so good. I love all the flavors but Grape really catches me. I would recommend these to anyone. Try out the 48 Variety Pack before you pick and choose like I did though.

This is one of the best coffees I have brewed in Keurig. I tried to order it on my Subscribe and Save account and it is impossible. I called and was on the phone for quite a while with the rep, and she told me to input some numbers but there was nowhere on the website to do so.

review_title: Tasty but relatively high in calories
review_text:
This is a tasty drink that is all natural. However, a small 8.3 ounce can contains a relatively high 140 calories which is roughly the same number of calories in a 12 ounce Coke. Only, a Coke is about 50% larger in volume.

I like sweet, but to me this is a bit too sweet. It might be nice as a mixer in an adult beverage though. I haven't tried to mix it, but you could probably make a nice fruity alcoholic drink out of it.

The price isn't a bargain. At nearly $1 per can, as of this writing, it wouldn't seem to be a compelling value. I do like it, but I doubt I'd purchase it again. It also left a bit of a lingering metallic aftertaste that I wasn't thrilled about. Still, if you don't mind the calories, enjoy a beverage that is sweet and are looking for a natural drink, then this could be worth considering.
"oooooooooo mmmmmmmmmmmmmmm oooooooooo", Is all I heard for two days after giving her these candies, Thank You.
Our dog loves these! Healthy and the perfect size for a quick treat or reward. They smell great, too! Ordering more tonight! And we LOVE that they are VEGAN and cruelty free!

Loved this wine. Most others that i make are on the lighter side, more for that womens touch. My husband and friends never quite got use to that. After making this though, they keep coming back for more. Very full flavored and body. I used a 6 gallon jug and only filled it to the top, which made this a little more of a strong taste. Will have to make this one over and over again. 5 stars from me on this one.

I recieved a coffee extract instead of a tahitian vanilla extract, and to my stupidity it traveled to Turkey with me before i found out, because it was well packed i didnt want to open it. But it was resolved very quickly when i contacted the seller.

This is the best marinara ever, period. We even use it when we make pizza and 3-4 spoons of it always end up in my mouth. I could drink it right out of the jar, it's that good. If you like thick, pasty, sugary pasta sauces better than this one, then leave it on the shelf for me!

If you liked Tazo Black Iced Tea in the past - you may not like it anymore. My wife and I have been buying Tazo's Black Iced Tea for several years. It was the best iced tea we ever found, and we enjoyed it immensely. Recently we ordered two more boxes from Starbuck's through Amazon. When we brewed the first bag, something wasn't right. The taste was bland, not at all like every other time we had it. We tried a second bag, and it was bland as well. VERY disappointing. My wife Googled and found on another web site that Tazo changed the formulation of its Black Iced Tea. It is a flop in our opinion.

review_title: pretty good, i'd buy it again
review_text: I thought this was one of the better flavors of healthy choice soup, i just added a little pepper to give it a kick. not bad, and it's healthy!

Either needs more filling or less cookie dough -- as the dough overpowers the filling, and the dough can really be "heavy" on the stomach.

Although all ls forgiven when these Newtons are crumbled a bit, put in a bowl and covered with a generous dollop of Vanilla ice cream.

review_title: tastes great but there is added sugar
review_text: This product does taste great, but there is added sugar. It is not just water with a splash of juice for taste. Sugar is listed right after water.

I love coffee...it's been a part of my daily routine since I was 12. However, caffeine is starting to trigger acid reflux AND is making me jittery - with only a cup or two! I've tried decaf, but just not the same and plus it still triggers the reflux. So I ordered the Teeccino Maya French Roast and just tried it. It is great! Like other reviewers have stated, it has a definite nutty taste, but very rich. I will be ordering this from now on. I tried it iced and it was also really good. My children love it and I can feel good about them drinking it too! The bonus is that we lived in Guatemala for a few years, so I am very happy to support organic farmers there.

Our family has eaten real maple syrup ever since we learned about all the vitamins and minerals you get when you eat it. Buying it at Wally world (walmart) or local grocery store gets expensive. Found this fabulous deal through the subscription service, comes as frequently as you want it to and it's great to say we get our syrup from a family business in New England!

This is good syrup!

Highly recommend, especially thru subscription!

I bought 2 dozen cans when it was on sale at my local natural food store. I wound up eating it every single day for 24 days in a row! It is very creamy with tons of chunks of mushroom soup. I also chop up some fresh mushrooms, parsely and a little garlic to "pump it up". The soup is just fine as it is from the can, but what can I say but that I am totally addicted to mushrooms since they are very low calorie, high in fiber and are a good source of Vitamin B! The soup has quite a high ratio of little mushroom bits, but I like to add some of my own fresh mushrooms to add to the texture.

On a cold winter day it makes a great "comfort food" Reminds me of homemade soup - very healthy ingredients. This is a stape in my house and I order it regularly through Amazons "Super Saver" - can't beat this deal, 15% DISCOUNT plus free shipping - why bother to go to the market when it can be delivered to your door?

Although the directions on the can say to add milk or cream it isn't at all necessary. The soup in the can is really creamy already.

I like to eat this soup with some whole wheat toast. This makes a nice little healthy snack.
My kids love this! Goes very well with tuna or cream cheese. Has a hint of oregano.

These taste great and have a lower sodium content than many fast food items. Great for mid-morning or afternoon snack with coffee. They can be rather hard but I soaked them a bit by dipping in my coffee or milk like a cookie and it solved the problem. They remind me of ginger snaps which I soak in milk when eating. Great price for the 12 pack and calorie count and ingredients is so much better than cookies.
good, right product, but one of the packets of cider mix wasnt sealed properly when made so the mix leaked out
These are a must if your pet needs medication. This price seemed a little high, but they are worth it.

review_title: Love coffee but can't take caffeine
review_text: I have three cappuccino makers and purchased only Peets special moca-java coffee grind! Then I found why I got constant headaches - it was the caffeine. I tried decaf. Decaf coffee is NOT no-caf, especially with Peets and Starbucks. Herbal teas get boring really fast; Teeccino is OK but after a while, ugh. The Italian roasted barley of Cafe Orzo tastes really great, satisfies me the way coffee did. Cafe Orzo recommends adding favorite flavoring; I add Toranio White Chocolate syrup. Result, really amazing flavor! Try it for yourself.

There were two testers--your reviewer and Family Member X. We deemed this pack of licorice the perfect snack to make us feel a wee bit better about watching a Hoarders Season Two: Part One marathon. We may have needed an Intervention Season 1: Then and Now to get us to stop, but the package was all gone, and we didn't go out hunting for more. And we threw away the wrapper.

Fibery, more cherry than pomegranate, but delicious all the same and addictive, these old fashioned licorice twists remind me of childhood and make me salute Paul Newman for the 1000th time...

I came across these @ BJ's last friday and I must say they are superb. I had to hide the bag from myself...I snack on a few everyday and this bag is just about done. These are soooo DELICIOUS and because both dark chocolate and pomegranate is good for you I believe this is a very good snack for a sweet tooth. I'm truly addicted.
I drink chamomile tea every night before bed to relax. This tea was a perfect blend of chamomile and lavender; it tastes great, and the aroma is lovely. And I love the fact that it's organic.

I have purchased this in the grocery store and found it to be a tasty and easy lunch to take to work. I wanted a case of this for my daughter to take with her, but when the order arrived I received one bowl not a case, called amazon and they said they would send a replacement right away, but the next shipment contained only one bowl again. Amazon refunded my money and said they would look into this. Told me to wait at least a week to reorder, till problem is solved. Other flavor I ordered shipped correctly.

review_title: most flexible Gluten free product we've tried
review_text:
We seriously love this product! It works in tons of recipes, great coating for meats and veggies especially fried chicken. Oh yeah, even makes great pancakes.

Thanks Bob.
Very good item. almost as I remember them from 40 years ago. Warm summer days under the grape arbor, cold ice tea, lemon coolers. A breeze to carry off a smile. Home....

I was a little frightened the first time I was asked to cater a wedding reception that was all gluten free, once I found out that I could order the gf pasta from Amazon I thought it might not be to bad after all. It cooked up like any other pasta except the water was a little murky and the pasta did have almost the same flavor. I was quite pleased as were the guests. On the down side would be the 12 oz packages (I would have liked it better in bulk) and the price was more than I would have spent. All in all, if approached again, I would place another order.

When I bought this, I didn't realize the noodles are different from Ramyun spicy picante. Ramyun is the thinner yellow noodle and neoguri is the thicker white japanese udon noodle. Unlike the kimchi flavor, this has enough spices to satisfy your craving and since I do not dislike udon noodles, I give it 4 stars. But it is not as good as Ramyun picante and I give ramyun 5 stars. My boyfriend is german / irish American and he loves these noodles...even this spicy neoguri. I believe the fishy smell would be for the seafood flavoring. This is for a 30 pack/case and there is a 20 pack/case which may be cheaper. So if you still aren't sure, try a pack before you buy a case.

review_title: A healthy, tastier alternative to Twizzlers/Red Vines
review_text:
Our three-year-old should probably be writing this review since he can never get enough of these twisted takes on fruit ropes.
The Clif Bar folks have taken organic apple and apple juice puree, mixed in a natural strawberry flavor and come up with a healthier version of Red Vines or Twizzlers that packs an intense fruit flavor.
Each chewy piece contains one serving of fruit and there are no artifical colors.
The pectin leaves a bit of a waxy coating on your lips that feels not unlike lip balm--it would probably be a bonus in the cold, winter months.

These look, smell, and taste vile. I try each food first before I give it to my baby and have been very happy with all of the Earth's Best varieties we've tried so far. The bananas however are quite disgusting. It could be the citric acid used, but it smells and tastes like it is spoiled. I have been feeding fresh banana up to this point, but bought a 12-jar variety pack of fruit which included banana, so I decided to try it today. So much for saving money by purchasing the variety pack. I will be throwing away all four jars of the banana. I will not feed anything to my baby that I wouldn't eat myself. Like one of the other reviewers said: do not stock up on this before you try one jar first. It's just nasty. I wouldn't give it any stars if that was an option here.

Update: I still won't buy these bananas again, but I wanted to say that I contacted Earth's Best to complain. They ended up sending me coupons for a dozen free jars of baby food. So, I just wanted to add that I really am happy with the company. Just not this particular product.

For the past year, I have had a monthly shipment of the Diedrich French Roast sent to my house. When they discontinued the subscribe and save for that product I was very disappointed and had to find a new french roast. After reading the reviews I decided to give the San Francisco Bay a try. I was a bit skeptical about the package and I am very picky about taste, however, I just brewed my first cup and I love it! It has a really rich flavor that seems to have more of the natural oils that you would find in a french press. Sounds crazy, but it seems to be true! The aroma is wonderful as well. I haven't gotten to the end of my first cup quite yet so I don't know if there is more sediment, but hey, I like french press so a little sediment won't kill me. I plan to make this coffee my new subscribe and save.

I haven't thought about "swine rind" in years. Just reading the reviews instantly made me so hungry for these crunchy, wonderful puffs;I will go out tomorrow and get some. One of my most vivid recollections is that of my first cousin sitting in his recliner watching TV eating "swine rind" he had just made himself, and drinking a 24 oz coca cola having the BEST time!! He was a farmer and he had raised the pig, butchered it himself, cut it up, and took the skin and made pork rinds himself. His wife was always nagging him about eating so much pork because it had so much fat; she never did any research because then she would have found how low in fat swine rinds and I didn't notice she had any problem eating pork chops (lol). I have never tasted any snack food than just the original pork rinds. So, everybody who loves pork rinds raise your right hand and yell OINK, OINK.

I have been drinking Celsius for over a year. I initially tried it because of the claim that each can burns 100 calories. I believe it to be true because the pounds came off. What I like most though is I work out quite a bit, am not a health nut or gym jockey, but when you walk 1-5 miles on a treadmill and find you burn 100-150 calories per mile and then think I can burn 100 calories just by drinking a can of Celsius which by the way is a hec of a lot easier than walking a mile, it becomes somewhat clear this is a great drink. For the record, I love the Cola the best, most of the other flavors are pretty good, the only one I did not care for was the Ginger Ale.

We took this on vacation with us since my dog is on a raw foods diet and we weren't packing raw meat for a 9 hour drive! She loved it and it was so easy to transport! We added water to rehydrate just to be sure she didn't get constipated from it.

We love Sunbutter! I don't have to worry about using it, as it and the company is completely PEANUT FREE!. Sunbutter taste great, unlike Soy Butter which is gritty and awful tasting. I use Sunbutter for anything that I would use peanut butter for cookies, frostings and candies, dips, etc. Sunbutter has the same consistency and texture as peanut butter and doesn't need refrigeration. When using Sunbutter for baking you do have to cut back to about 1/2 of the baking soda and/or baking powder or you can add a little bit of lemon juice to prevent your baked goods from turning green from the sunflower seeds. If your cookies do turn green it doesn't affect the taste just the looks (guess how I know that little bit of information :). Sunbutter also has a great website at sunbutter dot com with recipes and information about their products. Check out their site and defiantly get some Sunbutter.

I am extremely disappointed in the 2 pound pack deal. The mangos were not bite size, they were WHOLE slivers of mangos, some over 3". They were mostly extremely dry and tasteless. It seemed as if Bare Fruits puts their unusable left overs into those large 1# packages, you will receive a total of 2# with this order. A complete opposite to the smaller packages which I enjoy tremendously. I will only order the small packages in the future to avoid a debacle like this again. The bite size mango pieces in the small packages are chewy, tasty and a wonderful snack.
I'm new to the tea drinking world so I thought a sampler pack would have a wider flavor range. This sampler all taste pretty much the same.

If you like Starbucks, you will love Illy. :) Much better aroma, but similar style (more-or-less over-burnt).
My wife prefers it to Lavazza, and I have to oblige. If I were single, I would stick to Lavazza: great aroma, not over-burnt and half the price.

There is no question that when it has came down to microwavable pasta meals, they have been more of a miss than a hit, and sadly lagged upon the taste that was originally was suppose to appeal to the eyes. Barilla has known that when they have made pasta, and their microwaveable pasta meals actually stand out well. Their Whole Grain Mezze Penne with Tomato & Basil stands out well, not just in taste, but also feels like you're really eating pasta on the go, rather than something that was watered down from the other companies like Healthy Choice and their Fresh Meal makers, or other pasta meals that feels waned down. I liked how this tasted at the start, and it was easy to make and a treat to taste. I definitely love this pasta.

Price: B

Taste: B+

Overall: B+

review_title: The Best is not "Yet To Come" - It's Here!!
review_text: I have used most K-cups varieties and flavors over the past couple of years. I'm an old Navy man, so I'm required to drink lots of coffee (that's a joke, son!). This is the first batch of San Francisco Bay coffee that I've tried, and now I reach right past all the other brands on my kitchen counter to where this is. When I open a bag of these "cups" - there are eight in each plastic bag - I use one and put the remaining seven in a glass jar to keep them fresh. I've had my favorites among the various K-cup varieties over the years, but now this is easliy the "best". I'm trying some other blends of theirs now. Five stars is not enough.

If your looking to add extra B Vitamins to the diet this is the way to go ;)
I love the cheesy flavor I just about put it on anything even in fruit smoothies.

This is a great product. It is very healthy for all of our dogs, and it is the first food that they all love to eat. It helped my older dog lose weight and my 10 year old lab gain the weight he needed to be healthy.
This stuff is Great. Love that unlike corn starch it incorporates into sauces faster. Makes great fruit glazing. Would recommend.

Dry food, a vet told me, kills cats in time. He recommended this food and no dry. Kitty agrees... She was looking terrible, yakking up hairballs all over the house, every two or three days. After a 6 weeks of this food, she looks great, is like her old self... And not a single hairball! This is her favorite flavor.

review_title: Don't order unless you like crumbs
review_text: Five stars for the crackers, 1 star for Amazon's shipping. I've ordered these twice and both times they have arrived severely broken up. They aren't that way from the store, so I assume that it happens in shipping. We love these crackers--they are REAL whole wheat grahams--actually good for you! If you don't like whole wheat, thre is no reason to buy these.

I received these from my spouse because I probably would never have bought them myself. Honestly, I was not very excited to try these. I mean, it's candy. Not only is it candy, it's milk chocolate, and candy (especially milk chocolate) should be sweet.

However, these chips bring together that perfect balance of savory versus sweet. Like chocolate covered pretzels, but better because they're potato chips! The little ridges help with the texture, I think that was key, or perhaps I am just biased towards ridged potato chips.

This plays out as a balance between flavors and textures. Sweet vs salty. Crunchy versus smooth. These chips are fantastic. It's one of those things that your mind says no, but after thinking about it, realize that it was in fact, a great idea.
Probably our favorite of all the Kind bars we have tried. My daughter does not eat a lot in the morning but she will eat these. Thank you Kind Bars!

I purchased this item in preparation for our first cruise. Neither of us know whether or not we'll experience motion sickness on the ship. I plan to take a bunch of these along as well as the ginger crystals packets.

I honestly didn't expect these chews to be as good as they are. They're very chewy and sweet without being too sweet.
The ginger sort of creeps up on you as you chew them.

Very tasty, individually wrapped candies. I plan to put out dishes of them in our home for us and guests.

I have been using Lavazza Super Crema whole bean coffee in my espresso machine for over a year, and recommend it highly!! It is always fresh and creates a wonderful crema as well as outstanding flavor. I use 2 bags at 2.2 lbs each per month and Amazon ships automatically. Can't say enough for the coffee and the Amazon service.
I love hot tea and absolutely fell in love with this tea - which is the 'original' tea produced by Good Earth. You don't need to add anything - just place a tea bag in a cup of hot water and enjoy!

Finally a gluten free brownie mix that makes "real" brownies. These come out moist and delicious! My father-in-law eats half the pan by himself when I make them and he doesn't follow a gluten free diet. I highly recommend these!
We love Caribou coffee,plain and simple. It is my hubby's top 5 coffee's. He loves the Raspberry Chocolate Truffle also. But Caribou ROCKS!!!

I love the taste of these peppermint bark chocolate squares. They've got just the right of mintiness mixed into creamy white chocolate laid over a milk chocolate base. I love how the peppermint flavouring come from actual pieces of peppermint that have been chopped up into tiny pieces. It adds a delightful crunch to each bite.

The most unfortunate thing about these is how caloric they are - if you don't watch out, you can find yourself eating several of these in a sitting. Perhaps it is a good thing they're seasonal after all!

After running out of these, I picked up something I thought was the same at a local Target -- however, it turned out to have a dark chocolate base (the difference in packaging is very subtle, the red stripes are darker marron red instead of a brighter candy cane red) and wasn't nearly as good as these.

review_title: The best pizza sauce bar none!
review_text:
Don Pepino pizza sauce is the best canned pizza sauce bar none! DO NOT LET THE GIMMICKY LABEL DETER YOUR CONFIDENCE IN THIS PRODUCT! I was turned on to this sauce by a dear friend of mine who pointed it out to me in Swiacki's Store in Philly:
Swiacki Meats
3623 Salmon Sreet
Philadelphia, PA 19134
This is the BEST place to buy kielbas or any type of sausage in any form by the way, and they always stock amazing goods and groceries there as well. My very first can was purchased there. Buy local if you can!

Back to the sauce! They only use vine ripened Jersey tomatoes and I do not know what else they put in their sauce, but it is amazing! I bake my own pizza now and their sauce is the sole reason! The flavor and texture combination will literally produce "WOW!" results from guests at your dinner table. Beleive me, you would never guess the quality of the contents of this CAN!!! (not a glass jar) by the label. This stuff is amazing and you really need to try it for yourself. I will step off the soapbox now! Try it and you'll never look at another jar of pizza sauce the same way. It's just that good!

Fantastic snack for your baby without any major allergens (no wheat, corn, soy etc.) which is really hard to find these days. Although it does have milk powder, it shouldn't bother your baby if they can have formula or if you drink milk and they tolerate your breastmilk fine. Really, your child will love them. Both the vegetable and regular are amazing.

review_title: Very best for roasted lamb's head
review_text: This was the very best lamb's head that we roasted for Easter dinner! It was of a very high quality and every last bit was eaten up with the children fighting over who got the eye balls and the tongue!

review_title: best rye bread mix I've tried
review_text: This is the best and easiest rye bread mix I have changed and has a great texture and taste. My family loves it!

My daughter was diagnosed with celiac about 2 years ago, and has gone without pancakes ever since...until I happened to come across this at the grocery store. Really wasn't expecting good results - but it's very good! The non-celiac members of the family even prefer the gf version to the regular! Try it!

This was definitely not worth the money or the shipping cost. The caviar was almost inedible as it was entirely too salty (yes I know its supposed to be salty, but not THIS salty). Spend your money elsewhere.
I am not a fan of licorice but my dad talked me into trying these. I thought these tasted really good. I will be buying more of these.

I bought these after first using the Espressione Classic Coffee Pods, which I really liked. When I went back to by more of the Espressione pods and the price had increased by around $10, I decided to try these. I like a strong flavor, and these do not deliver. Next time I will go back to the Espressione and live with the higher cost.

review_title: Good price but not as good as original German ones
review_text: these are made in Spain and are decent. Better than US ones but definitely worse than German ones. Hope Amzn gets the ones from Germany here even if they charge more.

review_title: Healthier Cookie With A Decadent Taste!
review_text:
Fresh... six boxes... with a sell by date at least 4 months away. The sell by date is important in a product that says it's all natural!
The boxes say 100% Natural and are packaged in at least 55% recycled packaging.

No artificial preservatives, flavors or colors. No high fructose syrup. No hydrogenated oils.

The cookies are delicious!
A nice crunchy cookie with a semi-sweetish tasting peanut butter filling. The cookies taste like wheat more than the white bread side of things. Two cookies is supposed to be a serving size... I'm sorry to say... the first two times I had them... I couldn't stop at two!

If you're looking for a healthier peanut butter cookie... with a decadent taste... look no further... you've found it!
I highly recommend these cookies.

They're a bit pricey to be serving for children's snacks on a regular basis... but I would probably hide them in the top cabinet... lock it... lol... and bring them out in portion size servings for the children. :)

I really enjoy this flavor! It is delicious. My father enjoys this flavor. In fact this is the only flavored coffee he likes. My adult children loves this flavor too.

This flavor is good all day and all night! I love starting my day off with this coffee flavor. I love the smell of this coffee. If you haven't had this flavor before I hope you'll try it and I hope you too will enjoy it!
My kids really liked the Confetti Pop-tarts. Of course they like all pop-tarts!!! They are hard to find so glad there were on Amazon

Im growing wheatgrass to juice and so far these seeds are growing FAST! every step has been shorter then expected. Well packaged! each bag was the correct amount that i use for one tray. :)
Each tiny seed is taking off..if i drop one while planting i make sure to find it! lol these seeds are alive!
definitely will order from again..which will be after i run out hahaha
This is a very tasty green tee. We love the flavor and the fact that it is caffeine-free. It makes a refreshing beverage in the evening while watch television or reading.

We order by the case. This peppermint is clear and strong tasting. Celestial Seasonings is great at packaging the taste as if you just picked the leaves. During cold winter months we drink this tea every night.

I love my Keurig coffee maker, but haven't been real happy with the price of K-cups. I did a lot of searching around and was pleasantly surprised to find various sources through Amazon that sold the particular blend of coffee I like (extra bold!) at a really great price. I've ordered a couple of times and am really impressed with the quick delivery time. there is nothing not to like!

I bought this for a neighbor whose dog gets panicy during thunder storms. They wanted to try something other than the prescription pills they had from the vet which made the poor thing loopy. They are very satisfied with the results - this is the second order I've placed for them.
Great USB audio interface! I also own the Shure X2U and they perform just about the same...I wish I would have known that before I spent way more on the X2U.

For many years my cold cereal of choice has been Grape Nuts. It has a decent flavor, unbeatable crunch, no added sugar, no "chemistry" ingredients, and an excellent nutrition profile. (My hot cereal of choice has been old-fashioned oats w/ Raisins and Brown Sugar.)

Well, after a trip to Europe I am now a convert, and this has displaced those faithful Grape Nuts for a permanent place in my pantry. This remarkable cereal is made of simple ingredients; rolled whole grains (wheat, barley, and oats), dried fruits, seeds, nuts. (Think granola without the sugar or the baking) No added sugar, binders, starches, preservatives, oil, flavor enhancers, salt, etc. For those concerned about processed food intake, take comfort that the only processing this has undergone is that the grains are steamed (which is done during the rolling process; this makes the grains edible), and then the drying of the fruit. While it doesn't qualify as a "raw" food (grains are largely indigestible completely raw) it's much less processed than just about any other cold cereal out there except Granola.

While it obviously has no crunch, it has a pleasant chewiness instead after soaking in milk while you take your shower or wait for your coffee to brew. I usually chop up a banana or toss in some berries if I have them on-hand. (I tired soaking overnight, and thought it got too mushy) It has more flavor than the Grape Nuts, and two "servings" (2 x a puny 1/4 cup) of this make for a similar nutrition profile. (The fruit displaces some of the starch for sugar, and the seeds add a trivial amount of fat.)

I considered giving some genuine European Muesli a try, but the ones I looked at (Familia) have either sugar and/or a large amount of dried fruit, which, after having this stuff, is totally not necessary. (Of course, as a Grape Nuts replacement, just about any cereal with sugar in it tastes sweet.) The amount of dried fruit in this cereal is enough to give it a little flavor, without overwhelming you with cloying sweetness.

Don't be fooled by the Kellogs "Mueslix." They started with traditional Muesli, and then they added unsweetened flakes (corn?) to it. This introduces soggy nastiness for no particular reason. I guess they thought suggesting the cereal soak for a few minutes (and leaving out the flakes) would be too complicated.

The only "drawback" of this cereal is that it feels expensive for the little bag. However, you can get eight hearty servings out of it, and you'd have to resort to some fairly pricey major-brand products to get something this tasty, unprocessed, and healthy.
What a nice change from the usual snack food. The corn is definitely the best thing in the bag, the peas run a close second. It's hard to believe that it's not "junk food."
Gave this to the nurses at Mom's rehab place. They were thrilled to have so many gourmet treats. Some liked the sweets, and some liked the salty. Everyone was really pleased. Great gift, good value.
This a nice tea chest, but for the price, I was really shocked by the size. It is not worth the $50 it cost. I wouldn't send this as a gift again, it's worth half the price!

This item comes in a 24oz bag packaged and sold by Sweet Gourmet. The bag is resealable and seems to protect the candy from melting; I was worried that the gummies might melt in the 90+ degree weather in the days leading up to its delivery. As for the candy itself, it's good but lacks the flavor intensity that you get in the much better known Trolli peach rings. Expect the same softness and that you get in the peach rings, however.

Packagining: 5 stars

Candy: 3.75 stars

review_title: Turned down by a turkey junky!
review_text: When you have a cat that craves turkey and basically, all types of poultry, it stands to reason that he should love this one, right? Well, with a quick flip of the tail and a nose in the air, it quickly went down the garbage disposal after a long argument! Good thing I only bought one! Can't understand this at alll either - he loves the Friskies general brand of turkey, but hates it in Fancy Feast. Same company, you'd think this one would be better, not so! Anyway, try it for yourself particularly if you have a fussy cat because they're full of protein and vitamins. One of the best cat foods out there (they put Iams to shame!) for that. They're healthy foods, improve their energy and coats, and overall health. Just have to pick and choose though because they certainly can surprise you!

review_title: The tastiest treats in the treat cabinet (I think?)
review_text:
My dogs love these treats. There are a number of other lower-quality brand treats in our "treat cabinet", but both of my dogs start trying to get to the Newman's Own bag whenever I open the cabinet door. I can definitely tell they like them the most. And shhhh, don't tell them... but it is probably the healthiest choice for them from all the treats in that cabinet.

The treats sort of smell nice... dare I say "fresh". I am almost tempted to break off a small piece and try it myself (ALMOST, but not quite).

I think I will stop buying the cheaper, unhealthier brand treats from now on and go with the Newman's Own Organics line. It will be a nice compliment to their quality dog food, Chicken Soup for the Dog Lover's Soul.
The flavor of this coffee it so rich I love it. I add whipped cream to top off a great cup of coffee !!
You need more coffee product per cup than recommended, does not dissolve or stay mixed well, weak flavor
My teenage daughter has dietary issues and can not eat regular chips. I buy these for her school lunches. They are a treat that she can indulge in. They taste great.

Homogenization and ultra-pasteurizing having ruined milk as a healthy product, we have long searched for a tasty powdered milk substitute. This product has superior flavor and is easily mixed into either cold or hot water. The container is a tin and has a tightly-sealing cap to ensure freshness.

Had some problems with this batch of K cups. Seal seemed to be loose on some of cups and caused grounds in the coffee and overflow of water from pot. Have never experienced this problem with any other K cups.

Definitely found out that although this flavor is great, it stains anything and everything. Even if I use one tub to four quarts, it's VERY dark. I have decided to stick with the lighter colored Crystal Lights to prevent anything else being red. :)

My wife and I spent months trying to find an ideal dog food for our pack of vicious toy poodles and Chinese Cresteds. We wanted a brand that was all natural and as close to home prepared as possible. We have had our pack on this brand for many years now and they are extremely healthy. While I am not sure if this food has anything to do with it or not, one of our pack has Addison's disease. We discovered it when she arrived from the person we adopted her from. She is a Toy Poodle that should have weighed 7 pounds, but when she arrived she weighed only 4.5 pounds. We would put her food down and she would act like she wanted to eat but she couldn't. She would hover over her bowl but would not take a bite. Our vet, probably the best in Louisville, KY, diagnosed her within 2 days. After we started treatment and got her electrolytes stable, we took her in the following year for her annual exam. The vet could not believe it was the same dog and he said it was the first time that he had ever seen a dog with Addison's look so good. That he could not even tell that she had the condition. My wife and I, unscientifically attribute it to our diligence with her medication and a healthy serving of Nature's Variety dog food twice a day.

In our opinion and experience, there is no substitute for a good diet for healthy and happy dogs. I would recommend this food, and have recommended this brand to every dog owner that I come across.

review_title: Sort of not what I expected for the price
review_text: I have having this in my cart for a while since my friend wanted to try it for s long time, but was trying to justify if it was worth its weight in taste. I finally bought it and spilt it equally between ourselves. It was lean and smokey, but it was indeed salty. I liked it enough to want to eat at least 2-3 sticks in one sitting, but the salt content did not allow me to. It is still good and no oily after taste in your mouth like Slim Jim, but I don't think I could buy another set if it would be too salty.

Like all the other Zuke products that I buy, this one is excellent quality. My pup loves it. I sometimes give her the whole thing after exercising. She gets so excited!! I have tried the beef and the bison, and they are both great. Never has a problem with upset stomach for that matter. Recommend for owners that don't buy treats from China and are looking for quality.
