Great price for what you are getting. Recording via a USB port ROCKS!!!! The only thing that could maybe be improved is the durability. It feels like a toothpick in your hand. It may be more durable than it feels, but I'm still going to be very careful with it. But, for the price this is only a minor gripe. Great product, I would recommend it to anyone.

Some reviewers must have a short memory. I've been eating Beer Nuts since childhood and the ones I ordered tasted like they always have (sweet and salty). Bought them locally until I couldn't find them anymore. Great product and price for 6/12oz cans.

Tempo makes great swedish meatballs. I have used them for years and you can add different sauces to your finished meatballs. They are so moist, everyone raves over them. Sometimes I find them at the stores and sometimes they are out, so with Amazon, I always have them when I need them.
LC in PA

For someone who loves the taste of bourbon and whiskey but can't have alcohol any longer, I thought the concept Arkay has was a huge deal. I mean, come on..All the taste without a hangover...the beauty is in the marketing! So, I bought a bottle. And that my friends, is where this slippery slope of my happiness endeavor crashed landed into a bank of trees. I saw a You Tube video where this bar tender said...it's weak...but good. I read the reviews where it smelled like shoe polish and tastes worse...(who drinks shoe polish?) Still, I had to try this incredible idea. I purchased it on a Thursday and had it delivered to my door step on Monday...so far...so good. It was packaged nicely and unscathed from its long journey across the state. I opened the bottle and waited....waited for the fresh aroma of whiskey...(It's not scotch...) to fill the air around me. This, my friends did not happen...I could not place the smell but it was very medicine like. I poured a bit in a glass and took a sip. Immediately...my mind went back to when our border collie tried to eat our living room rug. We bought this spray that was supposed to be so god awful bad that when you spray it on something, your own dog won't touch it. At that point in my life, I put some on my finger thinking it couldn't be as bad as advertised. That drop of "dog eating your rug repellent" was the only thing I could taste for three days...Not much different than my first sip of this "whiskey". I couldn't figure it out. I was like Vicks mixed with cough syrup and Listerine. I did the old, "this tastes terrible...try it thing" to my wife only after I filled the entire glass with Coke. She was brave...but could not place the taste as well. After walking around with this "whiskey" taste in my mouth for about an hour, I figured it out. In the medicine drawer in our bathroom, there are two expired products that not only taste, but smell like this Arkay product. Orajel cold sore medication and Orajel tooth ache pain reliever. The only difference is the numbing affect. So there is your review. If you want to sample this product before you buy it...take a drive to your local drug store first.

Read the labels of the cheap canned dog foods, and what you see might turn your stomach. Long ago we decided to feed our girls the best of available dog foods to prolong their lives, and keep them healthy and happy. For the most part I don't begrudge them the extra expense entailed. They don't have to eat those scrap heap items like necks, feet, undeveloped eggs, bones, heads, and intestines (and a small amount of feathers in the case of chicken) euphemistically called "animal byproducts." I read ingredient lists carefully so nobody can pull the wool over my eyes.

The label on the can of Artemis lamb looks like something found on people food, a pastel yellow background with a graphic of fresh foods like: tomato, lamb chops, carrots, greens, peas, fish and POTATOES. Below the attractive picture is the caption " home cook meal with natural broth." Below that ungrammatical caption and the all caps LAMB are the words "Made in U.S.A.", reassuring words indeed.

The can opens easily with its pop off lid. Though the Artemis is made with broth it's not runny or mushy, but firm in the can. Bits of veggies peak out from a food that looks almost good enough to eat and has a pleasant, mild smell. Our three dogs took to the canned lamb immediately and ate it with gusto. Since the canned food is so prohibitively expensive we give each of the girls a tablespoonful of it to add some interest to their plate of dry Artemis. This works out well for everyone because I like them to have mostly dry kibble for dental health and the added ingredients in the dry formula. Using this procedure a 13 oz can lasts us about three days.

Artemis products have a 100% guarantee from the company. If the customer or pet is not satisfied, return the product with proof of purchase to the place of purchase for a replacement or refund.

We feel confident and not the least bit sheepish about feeding our girls a quality food made by Artemis, a food with wholesome natural ingredients formulated for their needs.
A mutt on Artemis is a happy canine.

review_title: Great flavor, satisfying sugar free licorice
review_text: This satisfied my craving for chewy black licorice. A good sugar free product and cute bear shape. You only need to chew a few to satisfy the craving, so the tub lasts quite a while.

My Canadian wife is addicted to Red Rose tea. Nothing else will do. While this US version is a little weaker than the Canadian blend, it is the next best thing. Has been hard to find in the supermarkets. This was easy and cheaper than the Red Rose site, even.

My daughter is really into mac and cheese these days, so we decided to try on this sucker. Very simple to prepare and the instructions are easy to follow. It's simple yet cheesy meal. Needless to say that my daughter really really enjoyed this simple meal. Btw, you do need to add meat to make it the cheeseburger skillet.
I guess you have no choice when you live in Pa and My mom in Ga to take what is deliverd The photo show star flowers she got none I was told they are all white :( she loves pink
This coffee has a great taste, for anytime of the day. The coffee Pods are alot cheaper then the K-cup. Give it a try.

I ordered 2 cases of Campbell's soup. They were obviously packed by an incompetent employee - who just put the tray of cans in the bottom of a much larger box and threw a couple of pieces of bubble wrap on top. Both cartons arrived with no external damage, but the heavy cans had shifted around, in one carton 3 were open, with soup spilled around. In both boxes, several cans were dented. This was not the shipping carrier's fault - this was just incredibly poor packing. I sent a photo and described the damage in the packaging review that was available right after purchase. Amazon did not bother to even acknowledge that. Beware of ordering any canned products from Amazon, I certainly will not do it again.
I'm not a fan of rice.Then my husband has this as a side dish for our meal.Wonderful!!! Now we add it to dishes or just eat it plain!!! Healthy,too.What more could you ask for?

review_title: These kick Oreos in the Behind
review_text: I'm not sure what "Hipcat 21" is referring to, but the Tim Tams I just ate from Australia would be pretty darn hard to suck milk through. They are a layered wafer cookie, and you'd have to have the suction of a Hoover vacuum to pull milk through those babies. But, they are amazing little pieces of heaven, even if completely worthless as a straw. They are crispy, and chocolaty, and so darned good that I would gladly give up my Double Stuff Oreos if these were widely sold in the US. Those lucky Australians!!

i love peter rabbit organics for my kids. both my 10 month old and my 3 year old love them all. nice to have a healthy, organic snack in a container that's easy to grab and go. pricey though, especially for as quickly as we go through them.
Have eaten Jackson's wafers since 1977. They have the best vanilla taste of any wafer! Great for banana pudding!

Has replaced candy to curb my afternoon sweet tooth. Delicious and easy to throw into your pocketbook or breifcase on the way to work.

Also, much cheaper to buy in bulk then individually at the store.
If you have to watch your glutens, this crunchy snack is just what you've been craving. The granola comes in a variety of flavors.

THESE CHOCOLATES ARE THE BEST CHOCOLATES AND THE BEST VALUE EVER. I HAVE BEEN WAITING A LONG TIME TO SEE THEM BACK ON AMAZON. I HAVE TRIED MANY BRANDS OF CHOCOLATES BUT THESE ARE THE BEST BY FAR. THEY ARE ALWAYS SO FRESH, CAN'T WAIT FOR AMAZON TO GET MORE.

Parthenon Foods shipping from Chicago to here was exhorbitant - it cost much more than I paid for the product. Only 1 type of shipping was allowed, and I did not need it so fast. I would have preferred shipping to my mailbox at a lower shipping cost.

What arrived was not exactly what I ordered. I ordered 2, 3 liter bottles of sunflower oil, said to be in stock. I received 6 1 liter bottles, without explanation for the substitution. I did not complain because the end amount of oil was the same. However, no-one contacted me about the substitution and asked if it was okay. Overall, the oil seems okay, but this is not the ideal way to do business !!
These tomato paste tubes are great. You only use as much as you need, then cap the tube and put the rest in the refrigerator. These are so much nicer than cans of tomato paste.

There's nothing really wrong with this soup. It's a little bland, and there isn't enough there to make it a meal. It would be okay for an afternoon snack, though. The beans and pasta DO soften up fine, if you follow the directions.

If you love peanut butter but hate the fat and sugar, then this product is for you. It is fantastic in smoothies and shakes--has a real peanut butter taste. At 45 calories a serving, I have it almost every day with my Shakeology! I will always keep this in the house.

I used to eat this popcorn when my husband and I were stationed in Hawaii, and I have really missed it since I left there. I am so glad that I am now able to get it. Everyone should try this popcorn. It is the best!
Amazon lists salmon as the second ingredient. It is not! Would have passed if I had known that! My cat likes it so-so...

I believe I am permanently switching to this brand. I have extremely long hair (to my waist) and it even moisturized the damaged ends without removing my natural curl. It's a pretty light conditioner, but manages to work as well as deep conditioner or a leave in variety. Controls frizz as well!
I love steel cut oats, but these are the worst I've had. Bob's Red Mill cook up much better and taste great. I bought these in bulk and I'm debating donating the 3 remaining boxes!

I collect insects and various other specimens. I had these on my wish list for Christmas, so received them as a gift. After transferring some of my specimens to these containers I was closely examining one of them when the container spontaneously exploded in my hand, spilling alcohol and my carefully collected and preserved specimen all over the table and myself.

I guess I should have trusted my gut feeling when I first opened the package. They seemed pretty thin walled. I will continue to use them, but for temporary storage of specimens rather than permanent display.
My Dobes would barely let me put the box on the kitchen to open it! Terrific product at a great price and superior customer service.

I bought this kit and am very pleased with the results.

It fermented out to try rather quickly and after adding the F-Pack and finishing the process it turned out really nice and refreshing. It is a rather sweet wine with very fruity notes.

Great Value!!!
This is an excellent tea - subtle pear taste in an exquisite white tea blend

review_title: Definitely tasty, but not my favorite.
review_text: I will start off by saying that our household has no need for gluten-free products, but I'm always willing to try something new. That said, we've tried a few random gluten-free products, and these are actually pretty tasty. They kinda tasted like a spiced oatmeal cookie or a spiced carrot cake, except I am not big "spice" fan and the ingredient list just said "spices" so I couldn't pinpoint which spice it was that I didn't love. But my husband ate them and liked them AND my toddler ate them and liked them (though I've found he isn't terribly picky when it comes to granola bars) and I would eat it if they were all we had, but that strange spice flavor knocked them out of contention for me. But overall I'd give them a strong four stars.

These are great. Like them because they're small, so if you're looking for something sweet (or tart in this case) but without a full candy bar, this is a good one. I have loved these forever and am glad to see them available on Amazon.
THIS IS A EXCELLANT SAUCE TO PUT OVER PASTA, CHICKEN , FISH, MEATS VERY TASTY!

In each package of Nong Shim Chapagetti you'll find a round-shaped block of noodles and three packets; some dried vegetables, some gravy granules and some oil.

When prepared according to the directions there is no broth, just thick, dark, black-bean gravy.

So, what does it taste like? Imagine a deep dark beef gravy mixed with ramen noodles and you'll be close. It's not spicy at all. The taste reminds me of eating mashed potatoes and gravy at the local diner.

I like it as a change of pace from other packaged ramen noodles.

When I first received the Crystal Light Mojito drink mix I thought I was going to be disappointed, but to my surprise I was not. This mix mimics the mojito taste as well as a powdered drink can. I mixed one package with *almost* 2 qts of water. It was getting pretty watered down looking at 1.5 - 1.75 so I stopped there and tasted and it tasted perfect to me. So I would caution about watering down too much. My boys and I loved it!

I also tried a batch with rum instead of water, to make my own alcoholic version. Added fresh mints as garnish (since I had some in my herb garden) and it was very tasty adult only drink!

review_title: Decent, but not what I expected
review_text:
These are wasabi peas, but not the "airy" texture that I was expecting like the ones from Japan.

The Great Skott Great Scott Wasabi peas comes in six 8-oz individually wrapped bags. Shipping was fast from Amazon due to Amazon Prime (gotta love that). However, upon opening and eating these, the pea texture/consistency was not what I was expecting. I'm used to eating the wasabi peas from Japan (some combined in a snack mix from Harry/David) and the texture of those peas were more.....airy/light. I love that lighter texture, like a very light Whopper malt ball (if that makes sense).

The peas from Great Skott are denser/harder (as another reviewer mentioned). It's like they took peas and dehydrated them, then coated with wasabi.

Yes, these are wasabi peas (and probably healthier than eating Flamin' Hot Cheetos) but I didn't like the hardness and was afraid of cracking my teeth while trying to eat one of these ball bearings :-)
i found out later that the "king size" is actually smaller (3.0oz) than the size of other boxes. so for about $3 less, i could have bought the 4.75oz theater size boxes. doh!

review_title: Just right for a light lunch or snack on the run
review_text: I really like these small bowls - they are the perfect size to toss in the overnight bag for a short trip. Pop it in the hotel's microwave for a small dinner and you've saved $5 to $10 that you would have wasted eating out. At home in 60 seconds you have a snack or meal on the run that tastes good and requires zero effort with zero cleanup afterward. I have just gotten into the habit of always keeping some of these around for visiting kids as well.

review_title: Healthy on-the-go breakfast or snack bars!
review_text:
Kashi GOLEAN Bar, Oatmeal Raisin Cookie, 2.75-Ounce Bars (Pack of 12)

I buy these buy the case so they are always around. The individual price is too high to keep them in the house otherwise...

Basically, I use these as a breakfast on my way to work: cut out the temptation to drive-thru breakfast while eating healthy. With only 280 calories, and 5g of fat, I get a little sweet taste that tides me over until lunch.

I bought this from Earth Fare when they were "discountinued" items. I tried one first, and next day I went back to the store to get the rest (5 more) on the shelf. I love it! Every ingredient is great...sauce, seasoning, and the naan. Now I finished the last one, I am looking for more.

I love Quaker products but these soft bar is delicious! It's made of wholesome products with real bananas and almonds. You can taste the banana and shredded almonds are sprinkled on top. The nutrition isn't bad, it's actually quiet good. The soft bad makes a GREAT snack! I can't tell you how much I love these

I think some reviewers must have got into a bad batch, or maybe did not read the directions. I found this quite easy to prepare (fill water to the fill line, clearly marked, and microwave for 3 minutes 30 seconds). The topping should be heated for no more than 30 seconds. I found that the flavor was very good. It will not compare with good Chinese take out, but is OK for a quick lunch if you don't have time to go out. It is listed as having 13 grams of protein and 3 grams of fiber. It has 600 mg of sodium which is somewhat lower than competing brands. Overall, this is the best brand that I have found. I usually add something like a fresh apple after the microwave meal.

For those worried about the environment, the steamer tray (with lid) can be saved and reused for preparing instant rice or other meals at home.

An alternative meal is the Healthy Choice Sweet and Sour Chicken which I have also tried.

review_title: Awesome popcorn!  Easy to use kits!
review_text: The popcorn tastes great and these kits are easy to use in our kettle popcorn maker! The kids love making their own popcorn!

...I've been making my own home-made pizza sauce for several years with home grown tomatoes, or top shelf whole tomatoes. Mine tastes very good! I've tried 'store bought' pizza sauces just to see what's on the shelves... yuck! WAY too sweet! Then I saw the reviews for Pastorelli's sauce on Amazon and - what the heck - gave it a try. Wow! Terrific pizza sauce! No preservatives, additives, no sugar (that I could see on the ingredients), nicely spiced and very 'authentic' excellent taste. Give it a try! (I make my own rare Italian yeast/sour dough 3-day cold rise crust, and store-bought offerings can NEVER replace THAT, thank-you-very-much ;-) The 8-ounce is good for 2 pizzas... I bought the 15 oz cans, - 1/2 can too much - and used the left-over for pasta sauce. Good that way, too.

This is my favorite tea. We'll brew one bag in a 12oz mug for 2-3 minutes. We'll add 3 drops of stevia extract. After that, drink hot, or ice and drink cold. This is the most smooth tea I can recall and the lemon flavor is strong but not acidic.
Bought these for Thanksgiving and Christmas baking and they worked great on my cookies and crafts. Cannot wait to see what else they can be used for.

I do not have celiac (that I know of) but am trying to adapt to a gluten free lifestyle to help with autoimmune issues. I just feel better gluten free. A dear friend of mine turned me on to Pamela's and I fell in love! I had been paying almost $20 per 4lb bag at my local health food store and finally decided to order from amazon. I ordered on Friday afternoon 7/24 and UPS had my shipment to my door on Monday morning 7/27. I was VERY impressed! I have made killer pancakes, zucchini bread, banana bread, and AMAZING chocolate chip cookies. My entire family is enjoying this yummy baking mix! Thanks Pamela's and Amazon!

By the way, my shipment came in a sealed Pamela's box inside of an amazon box and does not expire for over a year. I have been a local amazon customer for more years than I can count and have never received anything expired. Please pay no mind to that. :o)

I've contacted stores in California, Colorado, and Texas, hoping family members could mail me Maxwell House Coffee Singles, but none could find them. They must only be sold in stores east of the Mississippi River.

I've purchased this 4-box pack via Amazon several times, and the cost is less per single than if I bought Folgers Singles at a local store. This really is the way to go when only one person wants to drink coffee. You don't waste coffee grounds. Just boil 8 oz of water for one single or 16 oz for two; pour, wait 60 seconds, dip for 15 seconds, and you're done! If you like strong coffee, just let it sit longer.

Maxwell House singles have a smooth, pleasant flavor that don't give me heartburn like other instant coffees.

I know that my dogs have always enjoyed them in the past, but the bones that I received seem to be smaller than I thought they would be for a medium dog. My medium dogs have been enjoying them, but I just have to observe them a little closer than usual due to being small.

This mix is very good. I would add heavy cream instead of buttermilk the next time I use the mix. Also, I added sunflower seeds and chopped walnuts. It turned out better with something in it to me. I liked it.

review_title: Each to his or her own.
review_text: Amazon tried to hook me on these by sending me a free sample packet. I'm not sold. Caramel should have viscosity and chewishness (doesn't have to be kosher, though), which adds to the lasting and lingering pleasure of the experience. These tasted artificial to me. 2 stars. Unfortunately, I shared one with my wife, who proclaimed them light, bright, and divine, a 5-star delicacy at the very least. So in the interest of a lasting and lingering marriage, I'm inflating my rating and ordering a bag.
My kittens love this stuff, they like it in their food, and lick it off my fingers...

I ordered the Taco Bell Chipotle Sauce through Amazon Vine. We put the sauce on Taco Bell tacos and burritos. I thought the sauce was good. It tasted strong with a lot of spices. It was thicker than the sauce in the restaurant. It was thin but it must have many spices in it. My wife thought it was ok but found it to have a smoky flavor. I thought it was a tangy flavor.

John Navarra

The Tully French Roast is the strongest, richest, most flavorful k-cup I have found (better than Timothy's Espresso, which is weaker). This k-cup of coffee gets big compliments from all my guests- it's even strong enough to pour over ice for iced coffees.

The price on this 108 ct when I bought it was the best I've seen by far.

since i was a little tike many years ago i have been searching for the best black licorice i could find. rj's is a good one but wileys is the best.
i eat 1-2 pieces a day. i think it is good for digestion and the flavor is super. enjoy.

The CandyMan is bigger than I thought it would be.

It has several serving settings but the smallest setting is a good sized handful of M&M candy. It would be nice if it had more settings, smaller preferred.

If you mix the candy and make something like trail mix, the small setting is OK.

The silver base makes any dropped candy roll off the counter.

The motion detector is fairly sensitive but you have to be careful wiping down the counter or it will dump a handful of candy on the countertop or floor.

It is easy to clean since the clear top comes off, followed by the floor and then the auger that feeds the candy.
They taste just as they did when I was a kid. AWESOME!!! I wish you would bring this candy back to Alabama stores (CVS,Walmart,etc...)

I bought these for my daughter because she tried them and wanted more but we didn't know where to get them nearby. So I figured I'd just get a case and let everyone on the softball team have a bag. Now everyone keeps asking for more. They are surely a big hit! However, personally, they aren't my favorite. The sea salt and black pepper flavor are more to my taste.

I have three puppies about 18 months apart. I am crazy about them but they can be hard headed in a group. I trained each one by themselves initially and then as a group. These treats are small, moist and perfect for a reward! Now my guys will do anything to get treats! And the friends they have made on their walks love them too! MUST HAVES! Pups love them and they taste good too!
This is an outstanding product that I add to and makes the best Hot and Sour soup going
These are tasty pops, and they aren't too large. These things are so good they didn't have a chance, they were grabbed and gone in no time at all.

review_title: Hi-Tor Neo Diet for Dogs -- Dry food
review_text: This is another great product in the Hi-Tor line. Please see my review for the Neo canned diet for a lengthier review -- it all applies to this Dry Neo food too. My older dogs who have had kidney disease have had teeth pulled by the vet. The Dry Neo diet has small chunks & is easy to eat. All my dogs like the flavor & have not refused the food - ever. Because the chunks are small, they are easy to moisten with water for the dogs who need to *gum* their meals. I have to take a city bus to get to my vet now. Ordering my Hi-Tor foods thru Amazon & having it come to my door has been a God send. It is less expensive than what I get from the vet, I can buy it whenever I want, & it comes right to my door!! Hi-Tor has done a great job for years supplying pet owners with Special Diets. I have told all my friends about them & heartily recommend them.

My family has eaten Frosted Mini-Wheats for years and have always liked them. These are as we say in our family when something is really good, the bomb-diggity! We loved the cinnamon roll flavor. It wasn't exactly like a cinnamon roll, but close enough for us. It is sugary but also high in fiber which is a plus for me. I also like the little bites size better than the regular Mini-Wheats. A bowl of these mini-bites with a banana and milk make a healthy enough breakfast for me!

review_title: Must cut the grass and hand feed it to your animal
review_text: The kit works well and produces a lot of grass. Pretty easy to use if you have the right tool for poking holes in the bottom of the bag. I wanted my cat to be able to munch on this at his leisure but have to cut for him because the grass is so close together he cant put it out on his own. The amount of grass if great. Would prefer a grass that my cat can graze on his own.

While the product looked alright, I was disappointed with its packaging, which was extremely poor. It came in a plastic zip lock bag, which was frayed. The outer packing was also extremely bad. I was hoping that it will be packed in box to avoid being broken. The firm must improve the appearnce and packaging to make it more appealing and secure for shipment.

My daughter and I had so much fun discovering what was in the box. It arrived in a timely manner, the products were fresh and we enjoyed sharing not only the candy but our stories about our favorites. Next time I will try another decade just for fun!!!

review_title: The plant is great, packing is not
review_text: I ordered two 4" Baby Tears Plant, . I received them in a very good timely fashion, but I got them together in the same small box. The top plant was nice and green, very healthy, but the plant that was stuck on the bottom of the box was smashed by the top pot. Still I watered it and tried everything I know to do. After two weeks that plant is dead. But the plant that was packed on top is growing beautifully. I may order again from this company, but I will only order one at a time from now on
I have a very hard time finding this product locally, so I am happy to be able to purchase it via Amazon. The mints are always fresh and the shipping is quick.

Very good tasting sardines. No strong fishy taste or smell. Reasonable price. My last bulk order was the Reese sardines, but I like Roland better because they are more mild tasting. There are 4 tightly packed sardines to a can with no wasted space. These are the best sardines I have had in a long time.

review_title: This bulk deal is NOT a value...
review_text:
I thought this was a pretty good bargain, but each teabag is about a 1/4 full, some less than that. When buying it at the grocery, the tea bags are much fuller. Since I'm drinking it for health reasons, that matters to me.

It IS a good tea. I have PCOS, and normally have to take hormones (bc pills or progesterone cream) to get a period each month. I tried doing this alone, 2-3 cups a day, to see if it would bring on a period. I read in the reviews that a woman who hadn't had a period for several months did this, and she got it. I didn't get my period this month, BUT I didn't get breakouts (zits) or bad mood swings like I used to on the months that I skipped periods. I had only been drinking it a couple weeks prior to when my period was to start, so I guess I should stay at it a bit longer. I also bought Fertilitea and plan to alternate it with this. I don't want a baby; I just want to feel normal. :-( PCOS is challenging.

In summer, I grow my own raspberry leaves, and that is always best - so much fresher and stronger. But, this has to do b/c I ran out of leaves, and have to wait til May for a fresh crop. This tea has been of some success, but I know there are no guarantees on whether it will work for me, having PCOS. It is said to balance hormones as well as benefit pregnant women. When I get the barely-filled bags, I double up so I get a nice, dark tea. I like the taste, but it is different - kind of like a mix of green tea and black tea.

review_title: All Natural big pieces with no added sugar
review_text: I was nervous buying this at first because the description was a bit vague with a bad picture, but when I received the box I discovered HUGE pieces of all natural papaya which are not at all like the store bought kind. It comes in a plastic bag in a box about the size of a shoe box. This is pure dried papaya and it's a bit leathery, very colorful and flavorful almost like apricots, whereas the stuff you get in stores is more like candy, added sugar and SO2, and has a lot of water weight. Highly Recommended! I am uploading a picture.

I love my Senseo, and I am thrilled to have flavor options for it. Personally I am not much for flavored coffee, and I prefer the dark roast, and that is what I drink myself most of the time. One of my favorite things about the Senseo is how easy it is to make everyone a different cup of coffee. The decaf folks can have decaf, the regular can have regular. Now the ones who like flavor can have flavor. I will definitely always have the flavored Senseo Pods in stock in our home so that we have them to offer guests. They love it.

I like this vanilla over others I have tasted because the vanilla flavor is not overwhelming and it doesn't make the coffee seem too sweet. Overall I am pleased.

Despite the fact that Ranch Rewards makes it LOOK like their products are made in America, they are in fact made in China. It seems they are made using American products but processed overseas. Don't be fooled like I was.
Love love love this soy sauce. I have been purchasing the Ohsawa unpasteurized soy sauce from Raw Reform for several years now. Nothing else is this good!
Arrived when promised, and it was an excellent price-even without the discount code I used. This is our favorite gluten-free mac and cheese so I was glad to find it on amazon.

After a number of attempts to locate this product locally, I finally found it on your website.

Thank you

Our son has been on this formula pretty much since day one. It is much more inexpensive and more in a can than its main competitor. Even with coupons from other competitors, this stuff is still better. Our son doesn't spit up on this much, nor does he have much of a gas problem from it. I TOTALLY recommend it for the formula using family.
My husband & I really enjoy this spice. It adds a nice spicy / smokey flavor to sandwiches, salads, etc..
This product works great but no nasty side effects. Tastes smooth not a big chocolate flavor but enough for a non-tea drinker to drink it all with no problem.
Stash Organic Breakfast Blend tea tastes great, and the free shipping and subscriber discount help make it more affordable. Recommend!
I've had a few boxes already and they've always tasted fine. I can't really compare them to a local stores since they don't have any. A few different companies sell them, I buy the cheapest ones.

This is actually a chewy granola bar rather than the 'nut bar' (like Munch) that I thought it was.

When I opened the wrapper and bit into the bar, it tasted slightly stale. I checked the expiry date on the box - it's 16th August 2009 - less than four (4) weeks from now.

There really is no good news for Planters for this one. If the 'stale' taste is how it tastes, thumbs down.

If it is stale four weeks before the expiry date, thumbs down.

I don't like it.

OTHER INFO: Each bar is 220 calories (110 of those from fat), 7 grams of protein, 160 mg. sodium, 22g carbs.

Basically this is a review from my dog & as u see he wasn't fond of this food. I tried giving it 2 him based on all the great reviews it received from dog food websites but my dog walked away from his dish repeatedly & only ate this food as a last resort.
Only reason it doesn't get 1 star is because it didn't upset his stomach & give him diarrhea. Otherwise it's a thumbs down.
The coffee is very flavorful. I'd prefer a medium roast if it were available but this coffee is still very good. The price is also exceptional.

I will never understand why I can get almost all the Haribo products in the world at my local bodega with the notable exception of the amazing Primavera. Take back your Happy-Cola. Give me my Primavera.
Tastes great! Creamy! Best cashew butter my family has ever tried! I keep it in the fridge. It hardens a bit. So just let it sit ou for about 5 minutes or so, then dig in.

Obviously most people are buying this coffee for the price and convenience of Amazon. I used to buy the soft packs at Stop and Shop. Love the cans from Amazon: same great flavor/taste, better price, and not a chance someone tampered with the soft packaging to smell whats inside.
This basket is a great idea. I changed it up a bit by substituting a small bottle of red wine and adding wine glasses. The time capsule idea is great and the couple I gave it to loved it!
This is really good tea, It has just enough cranberry pomegranite in it to taste just right, I will definately buy this brand again.

review_title: HARIBO has THE Best Bears BURSTING With FLAVOR!
review_text:
First of all I would like to say that HANDS DOWN, Haribo makes the best Gummi Candies. It's true. If you've ever tried another brand, you'd know and once you try Haribo, you'd never go back!

These Haribo Gummi Candy Gold-Bears are just Bursting with Flavor! They are soft and chewy. (But not so soft that they are sticky and stick to your teeth)! I've loved these since I was young and now my son loves them too. They come in about six different flavors and each one is yummy! You also get a good mix of colors and flavors. They're a great snack and most people can eat them because they're not a "chocolate-type candy" where you'd have to worry about allergies.

They arrived at my home fresh and delicious. To keep them this way, I put them in two "Freezer Bags" and of course, I kept some out. Everyone that's stopped by has had the temptation to eat some and that's OK. I bought this HUGE five pound bag!

Speaking of the Five Pound Bag, the price for this is a true VALUE! These cost so much at the market or candy store at the mall per pound! And these are the same exact bears, but you don't have to worry if everyone has touched them or how long they've been out in the open before you came along to scoop them up in your bag! That's a big plus for me!

I definitely recommend these gummi bears, they are a sweet and delicious treat and the VALUE is phenomenal! I will definitely be ordering more bears plus a few different kinds as well. We all have our favorites!

This beef flavor Better the Bullion is 6$ in our Fred Meyer store. Even that seems really high for a small jar.
We do love it and use it often.

review_title: great tasting, low carb snack for diabetics and others
review_text: I was so pleased when Amazon decided to carry as a subscribe and save item these wonderful-tasting, low carb bars. This is a great product for Type 1, 2 and gestational diabetics as well as those looking to eat yummy food without worrying about the carbs or the chemicals that low-carb snacks are often made with. These are great!

I've been eating Snow's clam chowder for years, so I buy a few cans when it's on sale. Well it looks like Bumble Bee has taken over. What a big mistake. When I opened the can, it was all watery and smelled funny. I put it in a bowl to microwave, and noticed how thin it was, but thought I'd try it anyway. It was nasty to say the least. It about made me sick. So I went and opened another of the new cans, more of the same. Then I got an older can of the non-Bumble Bee chowder and it was great like always. If I could give the new junk no stars, I would. Sucks bad.

This is major comfort food for me. It's a little like kids' macaroni & cheese out of a box, in that it's filling and takes about 20 minutes to make, except this is usually only eaten on Passover and it's amazing. Children aged 2 and up will have fun squishing matzo goo into balls, and then a responsible adult can put the balls in the heated soup broth (and clean up the mess). My mom was the responsible adult in the above situation for years. One box = roughly half a dozen dinners.

Once again, Pinoy Outlet comes through. Ordered this product by accident, and Pinoy Outlet offered to take it back even though it was my fault! I kept the product and ordered the correct one, which was shipped promptly.

review_title: Best. Peanut Butter. Ever. ...though it's $3/jar in store....
review_text:
LOVE this!
Sooooo good! Nice sweet taste, creamy texture. Only kind we buy. Perfect for sandwiches, celery, apples, or right off the spoon!
WAYYYYYY over priced on here though! It's $2 and change at wal-mart and $3 at food lion.
SUPER DELICIOUS!

The flax seeds I received are contaminated with grit, dirt and rocks, and other filth, possibly rat droppings or leavings of other vermin and extraneous seeds from unknown weeds.

Having read a previous review which described rocks in the Bob's Red Mill flax seeds, I called up Bob's Red Mill and talked with a representative who said that this had been a problem but was now corrected. I ordered with confidence that I would get something that would be usable. Didn't happen. I called Bob's Red Mill and left a message requesting to speak with someone about the problem; I was thinking that I might have gotten seeds from an earlier lot packaged before the problem had been addressed. This was last week; nothing so far from them.

I think Amazon should not sell Bob's Red Mill unless there is evidence that they are willing to provide safe and clean products. You could easily scratch or split a tooth by chewing on rocks. Even with tedious sorting out of Bob's Red Mill seeds, there were still particles of grit and rock which were overlooked. I'm throwing out what I received from Bob,s Red Mill.

In the meanwhile I've ordered and received golden flax seeds from Arrowhead Mills. Absolutely delicious and clean and ready to use. Superb ground up with a coffee mill. These are available with a discount for subscribed delivery (subscribe & save) also from Amazon and can be found if you look around on the Amazon site. I am also subscribed for automatic provision of the Arrowhead dark flax seeds which are also excellent, with a somewhat different taste and texture and nutritional profile.

I love these things. They are great for gifts and wedding favors. I also found larger bottles and the ones with chocolate covered cherries. I am not a heavy drinker so they are enough for me. I did not have any foil sticking to the bottles nor did any of the bottles break. This might be because it was cold when I ordered them.
Actually purchased this for an outside stray cat, my gang is crazy for it and this will probably become their primary food.

good price for 2 lbs loose tea
the taste is very good
i have had better but not complaining

review_title: Eight O'Clock Hazelnut Whole Bean Coffee
review_text: The quality of this coffe is excellent. We enjoy grinding the beans for the best taste. We were also very happy with the promptness of shipping. Great value!

It's milk powder so there's not a whole lot to say about it. I bought it for use with oatmeal and if you mix it with agave/honey/maple before you add the oatmeal then it comes out nice and smooth, but lacks flavor since it is nonfat. Works for baking breads as well, though I haven't tried using it as a substitute for fresh milk in drinks. I like that the company supports humane farming of animals, and their fresh milk is some of the best I've ever had (also the only lactose free organic milk I've seen).

If you've never cooked with whole wheat pastry flour, you're in for a treat. We are all familar with the heaviness and "wheaty-ness" that regular whole wheat flour imparts to baked goods. But whole wheat pastry flour has been milled finer and amazingly, works wonderfully in baked goods like chocolate chip cookies. Most recipes out there will call for half whole wheat flour and half regular flour; I've found I can do that and no one can detect any "wheaty-ness". Allrecipes.com has a whole wheat chocolate chip cookie recipe that is one of my favorites. This product is not always easy to find on your supermarket shelves (look in specialty flour section, not regular flour section) so might be worth ordering online.

The Kenco discs have a smooth taste. I would consider it to be on the mild side. If you like breakfast blends, you would most likely like this coffee. If you like a bold or earthy taste, pick one of the Starbucks bold blends or the Maxwell House French Roast discs.

review_title: Reminds me of Margaritaville! Fun times! Fun drink!
review_text:
I'm a non-drinker, but I like the idea of a faux margarita--a "mocktail" complete with salt around the rim of a frosted glass. I love lemonade, but lately I've had an urge for something different. Thus when I saw this on Amazon, I went for it!

Am I glad I did! I just made a pitcher of "margaritas" and am sitting here in my Girl Cave, writing while imbibing in a Crystal Light Mocktails Margarita, 1.62-Ounce (Pack of 4). It was a warm California day and the night is still a little balmy, so this delicious drink is hitting the spot!

The cannister I received contained five packets that make two quarts each! Just think, ladies, I can indulge to my heart's content and never get intoxicated. And it's only five calories per serving. Isn't that wonderful? Actually, there's enough to go around, so come on over. :-)

You can't beat the trusted name of Crystal Light! And this product takes me back to the days when I lived above the beach in Capitola, home of Jimmy Buffet's Margaritaville. Oh, the fun and music associated with that place are beyond belief...

Here's to Jimmy Buffet, music, Margaritaville, refreshing margaritas, and you...

Reviewed by Betty Dravis, Octibert 19, 2011
Author of "Dream Reachers" series (with Chase Von)
These figs were wonderful. They were shipped quickly and arrived in perfect condition! Every single fig was soft and chewy - no hard, leathery, or dried out one's in the bunch. Absolutely fabulous!

review_title: Definitely worth the extra cost in comparision with in-store brands
review_text: Great cat food like the ziplock bag feature to maintain freshness, my cat attacks the bowl as soon as I pour it in. Its got everything from salmon, whitefish, vegetables, fruits, juniper berries, healthy ingredients that you will not find from any of the companies that sell in-store cat food brands, if your worried about the price being too high don't because it beats out Iams, Purina,, 10 out of 10 times. Or any other in-store cat food brand by a mile, mainly cause its unavailable in stores, since it comes from Canada so there's no retail price to put on it, and you really can't put a price on your cats health especially considering with all the corn/meat fillers, with chemicals that are injected in many in-store cat food brands these days, so that's why Im strongly reccomending orijen over in-store cat food brands.

I love fudge and have a terrible sweet tooth. So having said that these cookies are heavenly and the whole family loves them, grab a glass of milk and enjoy the ride! Although because they are soft it makes them a little hard to dip because they kind of fall apart. However I still highly recommended as they are so so scrumptious!!!
Finally a granola for people who cant do gluten. Love Grown tastes great, made with some really good stuff and none of the bad. I am very happy with this brand and will be purchasing more.
I'm a huge almond butter fan. This is by far the best I've tried!

Got this as a gag gift which was great for that purpose. However, I made the mistake of actually trying this. It was awful! Still, it served its purpose. My husband no longer thinks that EVERYTHING is better with bacon! LOL

These are pricey, but make for a great gift because (1) they're beautifully packaged and (2) they are excellent chocolates. When I was in Brussels I sampled chocolates from many different chocolatiers, and I think Gudrun represents Belgian chocolate well: creamy & smooth, rich and distinct flavors, and good consistency. I wouldn't buy a box of these for myself because there are probably better values for comparable haut chocolat, but these are impressively packaged and would make a distinctive gift for a client or associate.

I work with fondant a lot and I use to buy just white then color it, but that takes a lot of time, is messy, and the colors always turn out different. I discovered Fondarific and I love it!! They have tons of different colors and different flavors. This is a perfect color and tastes good, like watermelon.I really like the color and flavor of this.
My Japanese (WIFE) Born in Japan likes or loves the flavor as any Japanese woman born in Japan would like it.

I have used this product for filling in coffee cakes and also as filling in raisin bread. It is wonderful! Absolutely delicious. It is very consistent, which is exactly what a baker wants! I have used numerous cans and I am a customer for life!
I did not know there was a difference between "pods" and K cup coffee. Very disappointed in the description. Again, THESE ARE NOT K CUPS!!

This is absolutely as good as French vanilla cappuccino that is bought from machines in stores and a very good price as well.

Can't keep this at home, my whole family drinks it.

Wonderful products, great taste and great price!

I wanted some chocolate soymilk boxes to keep in my dorm room as a healthy snack alternative to the cows milk, snickers bars, and potato chips in the vending machine down the hall. These worked out nicely for me. They came in a nicely fitting cardboard box so they're very easy to keep organized and you can just slip them under the bed or leave in a drawer for those times when you want a healthy and tasty little snack. Each individual box does not appear to require refrigeration either until they are opened, making them the perfect healthy snack to keep in your dorm room, especially for college students who don't have a minifridge.

I was initially afraid to try ZENSOY brand chocolate soymilk since I'm used to drinking either Silk brand or Organic Valley brand, and had a few negative experiences with lesser-known brands of soymilk in the past.

However, I noticed that these were cheaper at the time of my purchase, and so I decided to give them a try anyways. I don't regret deciding to buy these one bit. I'm glad I gave them a try. They taste wonderful and the price was right. I love drinking these after I go to the gym to help my muscles recover and grow since they are a good source of complete protein. They also have Omega 3 DHA in them to help my brain work better. They're creamy, somewhat sweet, and have a deliciously smooth chocolatey flavor.

The product is vegan, so it should be great for kids with either animal product allergies or lactose intolerance like me. This is also nice since more and more information seems to be becoming available revealing how dairy products do not provide complete proteins, and actually have a broad range of negative health effects, contrary to widespread public perception.

All in all, the product was great, the taste was great, and the price was right. Five stars for an excellent and healthy product!

These are so delicious. They have a light carmel flavor that really makes them stand out from the original flavor. These are a great healthy snack. The normal price is really not a good deal, but I purchased them when they were on special for around $20. That price, you can't beat.

I give this three stars, just based on the price. It is 5 stars for flavor, but like 2 stars for how expensive they are (at least right now). Wait for them to go on sale!
One of the best tasting teas I ever tried. A little bit chipper than in local Whole Foods store, quick delivery.
Honestly, this has to be one of the best pasta's I have ever had. And what a deal on these - Amazon rocks!! Try this ziti you will just love it.

review_title: Used to love these little boxes....
review_text: I buy these religiously for my kids lunches...until today. From now on I will not buy these ever again. For a quick dinner tonight I put in a pizza and pull out 2 milk boxes for my boys. My youngest takes a sip and shakes his head dramatically. I don't think too much of it (he just turned 2 yesterday), then 10 minutes later he takes another sip with the same reaction. I take a sip out of curiosity and race to the sink to spit out the sludge/liquid rancid milk before I vomit. Now I'm anxiously waiting to see if he gets sick. I used to work in quality control and I now have no faith in Horizon's quality assurance/control practices. Never will I buy this again!

I was happy to find this item. I had a similar item for my Equal, but I have switched to Splenda because it doesn't lose its sweetness in hot beverages. This pocket dispenser is great, it dispenses one tablet with each press of the release button. The only reason for the 4 stars is that these tablets do NOT actually equate one tablet to a packet. It's more like 3 tablets are the equivalent of 2 Splenda packets. But all in all, I am happy with these dispensers for their convenience.

review_title: Nothing like Earl Grey except  for the smell
review_text: I bought some bulk Earl Grey tea from another Amazon supplier in the past (Frontier) that was rather pleasant. But this one was pure disappointment! It smelt good when you opened the bag but performed really poorly when you brewed it. Dark in color and bitter in taste with an almost no existence bergamot flavor! If you really appreciate a good Earl Grey I will advice you to pass on this one...It was cheap, I guess too cheap to be true. Lesson learned.

I bought these to give away for Halloween and had over a hundred left so I tried some and they are fantastic. I never knew how good suckers could be. Buy some and you'll be satisfied. Organic in candy means it tastes cleaner. P.O. Thompson

I like the berry and lemon flavors of these better, the PB was soooo very sweet that I could only eat half with a cup of coffee. This flavor is like a treat, not a meal replacement. The Lemon Lift is best

These are the closest to saltine crackers I have found. Like most gluten free crackers, they are a bit bland tasting, but are much like saltines in taste and texture. I have even salted them and tapped off most the salt; enough stays in the little holes that I will eat them plain. They work well with cheese, peanut butter, and soup. I like the taste better than the Glutino crackers.
This is the best icing ever. My family loves it, especially my children. It would not be a birthday without this icing on their cake. So good!

If you make your own iced tea, this (plus a pinch of citric acid) is just the thing to get that slightly tart peach flavoring that Snapple does so well. This, and the "old fashioned" bitters, are my favorite flavorings for iced tea.

The picture on the front is super macro. The "broccoli florets" are barely worth even mentioning. If you put all the shreds back together you might have one normal piece of broccoli.
I was hopeful about the creamy cheese instead of powder, but this pales in comparison to the regular Velveeta shells and cheese. This tastes like they added heavy cream or sugar to it.
The pasta, it turns out, is orzo, which generally I do not like simply because the firmness of it is never quite right.

Since you have to buy and prep the chicken separately anyway, I honestly would have been happier had I added chicken and frozen broccoli to the cheap store brand mac n cheese. Either do that or buy the frozen cheesy chicken meals that actually have chicken and real broccoli in the package.

review_title: Great for a Number of Things
review_text: Braswell Red Pepper Jelly is slightly spicy, but not, I think, what most people would consider "hot". The heat and flavor comes from red pepper flakes. I enjoy it with eggs in the morning. Roast meats and sandwiches also pair well. I think its greatest application is as a glaze for baked ham.....Delicious!

Thought I would receive this item in it's original packaging but instead it was bagged for bulk and labeled. I reviewed this product from other sellers and manufacturers and this was the best buy/price. I guess it's ok for some but I didn't like receiving it in bulk packaging. The candy is excellent.

Our son is gluten free. It took us a few days, but now we all like these O's. The kids eat them with milk and dry too as a snack.

We also feed them to our baby. They are a bit harder than Cheerios so we have to soak them for a few seconds before we give them to the baby, but they work just fine.

review_title: perfect delivery and great product, a keeper!
review_text: We are on a diet and decided to try this herb coffee and I must say it is worth every drop of goodness.

review_title: Perfect for me and my toddler
review_text: When my 20 month old daughter saw me eating one of these, like with everything else, she wanted some. Now they are a must in our diaper bag. They are tasty and I feel good about giving them to her. She thinks they are cookies!

The taste instantly reminded me of my last cruise, sitting on the pool deck and drinking a fruity alcoholic "drink of the day". Basically, it tastes good and is not hard to get down or anything like that. The first time I tried it like a shooter, literally shooting the whole thing. That was a mistake, I think it is better to just sip it three to four times instead.

As for the energy boost, I think the 1-shot a day idea isn't going to do much to boost your energy level. But if you take three or four of them a day, then yes I can see it giving you a boost. Unfortunately you also need to apply for a bank loan to be able to afford it.

Eden has the best beans in BPA Free Cans and No salt added which is great. it was a big disappointment that the Eden Garbanzo Beans was removed from Subscribe n Save. the price from this seller is too high. I now have to our he these beans elsewhere at a lower price.Amazon put Eden Garbanzo Beans back on Subscribe n Save

Smells great, but there is little of the wonders found in the aroma actually present in the flavor of the coffee. The chocolate flavor was very, very mild. Some may like the mild flavor, but I was hoping for something a little more bold.

I picked this up at a Fresh & Easy. While I like the idea of more choices than the officially licensed K-Cups, this is just not a good coffee. It tastes bitter and bland. Not recommended. Try Millstone's Fogchaser K-Cups instead.

I just love Knorr Hunter Schnitzel Mix. I find it very hard to find in grocery stores. The pork cutlets you make with it are also a little hard to find, but on the West Coast Trader Joe's has them. If people knew what schnitzel really is, and how easy it is to make fabulous schnitzel with this mix, I'm sure every store would carry it in their foreign foods section. It's especially good for days when you are pressed for time, or dead beat and you want to make an extra good meal, or if you have company coming. I like to serve it with a little spaetzle, though the more authentic way is with roasted potatoes and a little Rot Kohl. Now if I could only find some great ready-made spaetzle for those busy days. The instructions are in German, which is not really that hard to read, but if you need help, Google translate does a fine job. There is an American version of this mix, but I don't live in Pennsylvania, so I was delighted to be able to get it quick and fresh over the internet.

Having traveled to Costa Rica recently, I had this coffee. It is rich, full bodied and without any bitterness. Was very pleased to see that I could purchase it on Amazon because I finished the bags of the Cafe 1820 that I brought home with me. It is excellent! Everyone that I served it to loved it!
Excellent masala. I love using it with V8 and hot peppers to make great dal!

Read this article from NBC Nightly News about arsenic in organic sweeteners like brown rice syrup (one of the main ingredients in this product) and you might think twice about purchasing these cereal bars. My daughter had been eating them regularly as a snack...not anymore.

"High levels of arsenic, a chemical linked to cancer, chronic diseases and developmental effects, have been found in foods that list organic brown rice syrup as a primary ingredient, according to a new study from Dartmouth University..."

[...]

After sending these chocolates as Christmas presents in the last two years, I have decided to sample them myself.

If one includes shipping, these chocolates costs around $1.50 per piece. That is not the highest chocolate price but still a premium price.

As others have noted, the packaging is very well done. The box itself is wrapped in a stryofoam box. The ribbons add a nice touch to the presentation.

The taste of these chocolates, however, is merely good. As a comparison, I think the Dove chocolates one can get at a grocery store is about 80% as good at about 1/5 the price.

I think Godiva chocolates are about as good.

But no one gets credit and thanks for sending Godiva (non-box kind) or Dove chocolates for Christmas and they certainly don't come in a nice box with a ribbon and a Belgian chocolate brand.

I have tasted better chocolates.

If you want the most premium tasting chocolates possible, then these will somewhat disappoint. Nonetheless, no one will dislike these chocolates especially when given as a Christmas present.
Arrived in good conditon on time as promised. It is what it is, just more of it cheaper. Subscribe and save 15%.

review_title: Taste great, but second ingredient is SUGAR!
review_text: These are very good tasting and when I gave a few to my baby he loved them! But after looking at the back and seeing that the second ingredient is sugar I decided this probably isn't the kind of thing I want my baby to get used to. I don't want him to get used to sugary snack foods at such a young age, I'm sure there will be enough of that when he's older. I wish Happy Baby would come up with a yogurt snack with no or very little sugar, I would buy it than.

This was a great cereal but the shameful Kellogg's has done a "bait and switch." This is now a high carb/high sugar cereal with the same name. I guess their bean-counters are calling the shots now, and not the nutritionists.

About four weeks ago I sent Kellogg's an email to their customer office requesting that they contact me regarding this cereal and I am still waiting for a response.

Will Kellogg is rolling over in his grave.

If I could give this product 0 stars, I would. The description sounds great but what they forgot to mention is that when the urine clumps up it doesn't go through the spaces. This cat litter box causes triple the mess to clean up. Buyer beware. Don't waste your money!

Bought this back in Nov 2010 along with the instant Clearjel. Love it in everything I've used it in. Can't wait to use the instant when I can this year, expecting good things.

Only con is the high cost of shipping. So this is what I think. They offer the product at a seductive price then make up the loss with s/h fees.

I used GU Gel for my last marathon. Eat one about every 4 miles and I strongly believe that it helped keep me on pace and enabled me to recover much more quickly than in previous marathons that I have run.

i love eating candied ginger but it gives me a sore throat. So i found these and tried them out. They do taste like ginger but don't bother my throat at all. They are more sweet than savory. My only concern is that the candies in the bag i got were a tad gummy. As if they were exposed to humidity. I like my candies to be rock hard. So that is the reason for the 4 stars, when it comes to food i'm big about texture.

I liked this one and I was relieved to see there is no MSG included in the ingredients list, unless they're hiding it under an unfamiliar name. It's spicy but not hot spicy, creamy and tastes good. I used it as a dip for chicken strips and think it would make a good dressing for taco salad and in burritos.

review_title: TIMOTHY'S MIDNIGHT MAGIC, EXTRA BOLD K-CUPS
review_text: I've been using this coffee, (Timothy's K-cups Midnight Magic, extra bold.) for about a year. This is, in my humble opinion, the best coffee of all K-cups. When we make it we use the small cup, but make a double small cup by lifting the lid a bit then closing it for the Keurig to recycle which makes one extra large cup, so be sure to use an extra large cup or it "shall runnith over". The coffee comes out excellent like this and is still a bit bold. We also use "International Delight" coffee creamer as it is non dairy (Great for us geezers with a lactose intolerent problem.) and we only use a much smaller amount to achieve the same lightness as milk, unless we use the fat free variey, in which case we have to use much more which waters down the coffee. For the litle bit that we use we can afford that tiny bit more fat in the creamer. This combination makes for a rich and bold cup of coffee. We order 3 double packs for a total of 144 K-cups each month.

My little girl (6 months) can't stomach any formula. Even Nutramigen, at $35 per can made her colicky and sick (accompanied with the worst smelling spit up). The expensive formulas smelled bad, and tasted worse, I hated giving them to her. Goats milk was recommended to me. Her doctor's only objection was that it was low in Folic Acid and tended to dehydrate babies. Well, Meyenberg Powdered Milk is fortified with Folic Acid, so dilute it with a little extra water and you're in business! I now have the happiest infant you've ever seen. Enfamil can take that nasty chemical soup they call formula and shove it, I'll never go back.

You can get the formula Recipe at:
[...]

There have been concerns about arsenic in rice syrup lately, so I have been using Lyle's Golden Syrup, and she likes it fine (Also it's the best pancake syrup you'll ever have). I am going to try barley malt syrup next, it is chemically more similar to rice syrup.

This is truly a premium product, carefully packaged to maintain freshness. I am new to the world of white tea which has more anti-oxidants than green or black, and a really unique flavour that is wonderful with Garibaldi biscuits in the afternoon. The product is pricey but worth it.

I searched everywhere. Even discount stores. And buying in bulk (I purchased 3, which got me free shipping) meant that I paid even less than the sales prices with coupons at TJ Maxx or some other similar discount store for exactly the same brand. They taste great. I will definitely order again. They came on time when promised. You cannot do better that that anywhere, ever!

There were something like 6 marshmallows in the packet along with some bitter cocoa. The product was nothing like the product statement on the outside of the box. Too expensive! Will not purchase again!!

Glenny's white cheddar soy crisps have a nice crunch with a hint of cheese. They are a good choice for those looking for a low-fat snack. Because they contain rice they are not a very low-carb choice, altho an improvement over other snacks. Watch the portion size, as they are smaller than one might think.

This Island Coconut coffee is awesome! A friend shared it with me a few months ago, and since then I have ordered it by the 50 ct box more than once! I keep it at home and at work. Love the flavor and the aroma! Hope this flavor sticks around for a while!

review_title: I enjoy Madhava coconut sugar from Amazon
review_text: If I use sugar in anything, this is what I use. I love the taste. I was prediabetic, this is one of the lifestyle changes I made. I don't even keep white sugar in my house.Good product, fair price, always dependable & great delivery service with Amazon.
Switch Bev taste great, my fav was the grape but they all have a great taste. Most important my kids love them!

Merricks is the best, not by products! No bones, wings, legs - food is so good even I WANT TO EAT IT!!!!!

The glucotest really works. I wanted an alternative to sticking my diabetic cat's ears to test his glucose levels. He was getting inconsistent readings at the vet because he was too stressed out there. (I took him off all grain, fed him canned meat catfood, then switched to the raw (frozen) meat diet). To successfully use the purina glucotest confetti, make sure you mix it thoroughly into your cat's litter so it is all submerged. Any pieces floating on top I found did not give an accurate reading.The pieces that were submerged showed consistent readings and were verified by a recent blood test done at the vets when he was calm and not stressed. I checked the pieces by scooping up the clump of pee from litterbox and placing it on a piece of newspaper. That gave me room to pick out submerged confetti pieces with a pair of tweezers. That sounds wierd, but I am so pleased to be able to help my cat get healthy. He is stable now and getting better.

review_title: Contains inorganic arsenic, a known carcinogen
review_text: I had been feeding my baby this cereal for 3 months when I learned that Consumer Reports had tested this product for arsenic along with many other organic rice products and found it contains inorganic arsenic, the type that results from pesticide residue in the soil. This shouldn't be confused with the arsenic that they will tell you "occurs naturally" if you call. Inorganic arsenic is a know carcinogen and shouldn't be in anything labeled organic. Earth's Best rice baby cereal had the highest arsenic content of three brands tested. However, when I called them, I was disappointed by their lack of accountability and misleading information they provided, especially because their marketing (see above) goes on at length about the health benefits of organic, pesticide free products. They continue to claim that the product is safe, that arsenic occurs naturally, and they don't apply pesticides. However, they cover up the fact that the inorganic arsenic in question is not "naturally occurring," it is pesticide-derived and likely comes from pesticide residue in the soil. I asked if they planned to do testing of their own, implement safety measures and provide refunds to customers who choose not to poison their baby, but they said no. My opinion is that this "organic" product that is supposedly grown "without harmful pesticides" should be recalled and relabeled until they can show that it's arsenic-free. If you are buying this by the case and feeding it frequently to your baby, you may be unintentionally poisoning them.

Both of my cats could care less about ingredients because "junk" food seems to rule the day - taste over ingredients matters. I do not like to alter their diet, but if I'm lucky enough to find a good pet food offering both taste AND ingredients I'll stick with it, regardless of cost. Changing formulas is routine, but I seldom radically alter their diet. This is a big advantage as I've found that not all premium formulas work; there's no real correlation between cost and taste; I have tossed a lot of "premium" formulas.

I have 2 healthy, adult cats, and they are both "finicky" eaters. Not only do they like Merrick, but I am thankful that my guys like something with healthy ingredients.

Of four of my cats only two eat canned food regularly and one nibbles canned food when the mood strikes him. My fourth cat never touches any canned food. Therfore, the two that eat the canned food regularly liked this. They immediately ate some and although they did not finish all the food, I can tell they liked it enough to eat it regularly. (PS It is not too unusual for me to find canned food left behind no matter what the variety.) Right now they've had it a couple of nights in a row. The one that periodically nibbles canned food did not touch it.

What I like about this food is that it does not stink. Many canned foods smell up a house the minute they are opened, such as the Meow Mix, Surf 'N Turf Variety Pack, 2.75-Ounce Cups (Pack of 48). This one's smell is barely detectable to me.

The label also indicates this food meets the cats nutritional needs.

The first five ingredients are Chicken, Turkey, Chicken Broth, Chicken Liver, Ground Flaxseeds, etc. The peas, which are the 8th ingredient in the list, are noticeable but the last 8 ingredients in the mixture (artichokes, cranberries, pumpkin, tomato, blueberries, broccoli, cabbage, kale, parsley) were not visible. Perhaps they were blended in. There are also various vitamins and supplements in the mixture as well as the necessary taurine.

Overall, my regular canned-food-eating cats liked this and I believe the ingredients are healthy enough for them. I have been a heavy user of stevia for 4 years (3 packs a day). It has greatly helped me with dieting. But this is not as natural as everyone is raving about. Please google this product for sideffects. All white stevias are highly processed chemicals, slowly toxic to anyone who uses it regularly. I have been admitted to numberous hospitals with the medicals bills to match my stays. Doctors didnt find anything wrong with me so of course I hand to keep on doing tests because I had headaches ,dizzyness, high blood pressure, muscular and heart spasm etc.
I later stopped using this product and after 8 months of huge amounts water,kiwis,spirulina,excercise, detox. My health slowly returned. Forget about these sugar substitutes. Use real natural brown cane sugar, dark organic honey, unsulphured molasses or puree dark raisans and use it in your drinks. This stevia is regulated by the FDA for good reasons. If you are really stubborn use the green less processed stevia leaf. Leave all white sugar substitutes, processed but so called pure agave, high corn syrup,etc alone. I wish I had been warned before the pain, medical bills and lost wages

All four of my cats loved this canned cat food! The food in each can really looked and smelled as if a human being could eat the food.

The seasame chicken entree and chicken pot pie entree were both very popular with my cats. Neither flavor smelled bad. The chicken pot pie entree was kind of runny, but my cats really enjoyed lapping up the juice. I've feed my cats a few cans of each flavor, and none of them have got the diarrhea from the food. Their stomachs seem to tolerate the food quite well. I've had probelms in the past with canned cat food causing stomach and other digestive problems for my cats.

According to the can's list of ingredients, all the ingredients are natural - no by-products are used. While the food is not organic, at least the food doesn't use by-products. No wheat gluten is used either.
I went to the company's website and found that the company uses only dolphin safe tuna and does not use any child labor. None of the ingredients come from China, which has a horrible record on food safety. The cat food is made in Thailand, but as far as I know, Thailand does not have a poor record of food safety, and Thai people do love their pet cats, I sure Thai pet owners would not want to harm their cats with poor quality pet food. I personally see nothing to fear from Thai cat food.

I think I will be ordering more Petite Cusine in the future and would not hestitate recommending this food to my cat loving friends.

Excellent for your digestive track and memory, peppermint tea is a wonderful study aid and will help you stay focused without getting the jitters of caffeine.

A first class tea, and easy to recommend to anyone who enjoys herbals.

I did not feel it was necessary to add anything to the mix to improve it. If I were to add something, it would be fresh onion.

Falafel, particularly this mix, is good for a variety of purposes. One could for religious, moral, or health reasons avoid eating animal derived foods, and this would provide a great healthy filling food to fill any void left by the avoidance of meat. review_title: Really Glad I Tried Them Out
review_text:
I first heard about Chia seeds from a co-worker and the first thing I though of what the Chia Pet. But the more I researched them, the better they sounded. Full of Omega 3 fatty acids, protein, fiber, and oil, these are the better than flax seeds, which you have to grind to get to the nutrients. They also hold a lot of water, which I was hoping would help me with hydration.

The seeds are so small that you can add them to oatmeal, muffins, etc and not notice them. I really like the Chia jello. If you soak one tablespoon of seeds in water, they make a gel. I've drank the jello in mixed plan water and added it to tea or juice. I did find that if you put them in a mixture of grape juice and water they don't soak up much liquid.

I noticed that if you drink this plain, I felt a little dehydrated. So I drank more water then felt bloated. I've learned you don't need much more than a tablespoon mixed in water. Any more and it gets overwhelming. What I like to do is drink my jello after eating breakfast. I stay full longer. It's been helping me by controlling my hunger for my dieting.

The only drawbacks I've noticed is that they don't really help me with the hydration. They don't soak up as much water in a grape juice water mixture. And they cost about $11 for a 14-ounce bag. I find that a bit pricey but on the other hand, you are just using about one tablespoon a day, which comes out to about 28 days use out of one bag.

In the end, I'm glad that I heard about Chia seeds and got to try them from the Vine Program. This is one thing that I'm going to be sure that I keep in stock.

Shawn Kovacich
Author and Creator of numerous books and DVD's.
